mt: Khamis, Oriol Junqueras, antara sembilan pemimpin Katalan yang ditahan dalam tahanan awal sejak akhir tahun lepas, mengumumkan akan berlari dalam pilihan raya Parlimen Eropah tahun depan.

src: "Standing as a candidate for the European elections is the best way to denounce the regression in democratic values and repression we have seen from the Spanish government," he said.
mt: "Menyertajakan diri sebagai calon dalam pemilihan Eropah ialah cara terbaik untuk menentang kepurukan nilai demokrasi dan pencekalan yang kita lihat daripada pemerintah Spain," katanya.

src: Londonderry: Men arrested after house rammed by car
mt: Londonderry: Penahanan ketika rumah ditusuk oleh kereta

src: Three men, aged 33, 34 and 39, have been arrested after a car was repeatedly rammed into a house in Londonderry.
mt: Tiga lelaki berusia 33, 34 dan 39 ditahan setelah sebuah kereta dihujani ke dalam sebuah rumah di Londonderry.

src: The incident unfolded in Ballynagard Crescent on Thursday at about 19:30 BST.
mt: Kerajaan mengemudi di Ballynagard Crescent pada hari Rabu pukul 19:30 BST.

src: Det Insp Bob Blemmings said damage was caused to the gates and the building itself.
mt: Det Insp Bob Blemmings berkata kerusakan berlaku kepada pintu dan bangunan itu sendiri.

src: A crossbow may also have been fired at the car at some point.
mt: Senjata merentang mungkin juga ditembakkan ke atas kereta pada masa tertentu.

src: Menga strike gives Livingston 1-0 win over Rangers
mt: Serangan menga memberi kejayaan 1-0 kepada Livingston atas Rangers

src: Dolly Menga's first goal for Livingston secured victory
mt: Dolly Menga's first goal for Livingston secured victory

src: Promoted Livingston stunned Rangers to consign Steven Gerrard to just his second defeat in 18 games as manager of the Ibrox club.
mt: Promoted Livingston telah mengejutkan Rangers untuk menewaskan Steven Gerrard dalam kekalahan kedua dalam 18 pertandingan sebagai pemandu kesebelahan Ibrox.

src: Dolly Menga's strike proved to be the difference as Gary Holt's side moved level with Hibernian in second.
mt: Pukulan Dolly Menga telah membuktikan perbezaan kerana pasukan Gary Holt berpadu sama tingkat dengan Hibernian di tempat kedua.

src: Gerrard's side remain without an away win in the Premiership this season and face leaders Hearts, who they trail by eight points, next Sunday.
mt: Kemudiannya, kesebelahan Gerrard masih tanpa kemenangan di luar rumah dalam Liga Utama musim ini dan akan menghadapi pemimpin, Hearts, yang kini mereka ketinggalan delapan poin.

src: Before then, Rangers host Rapid Vienna in the Europa League on Thursday.
mt: Sebelum itu, Rangers akan menghadapi Rapid Vienna dalam Liga Europa pada hari Jumaat.

src: Livingston, meanwhile, extend their unbeaten run in the division to six games, with head coach Holt still to taste defeat since replacing Kenny Miler last month.
mt: Mengikut itu, Livingston telah mempertahankan rekod tidak kalah dalam kawasan selama enam perlawanan, dengan jurulatih Holt masih belum merasai kekalahan sejak menggantikan Kenny Miler pada bulan lepas.

src: Livingston miss chances against blunt visitors
mt: Livingston miss chances melawan lawan yang tegas

src: Holt's team should have been ahead long before they scored, with their directness causing Rangers all manner of problems.
mt: Tim Holt sepatu di hadapan sejak awal, kerana kebanyakan masalah yang dialami Rangers disebabkan oleh kejelasan mereka.

src: Scott Robinson broke through but dragged his effort across the face of goal, then Alan Lithgow could only direct his effort wide after sliding in to meet Craig Halkett's header across goal.
mt: Scott Robinson menembuskan bola tetapi menghentikan usahanya di depan gawang, lalu Alan Lithgow hanya dapat mengarahkan tendangannya ke samping setelah berlari ke depan untuk mempertemukan bola yang diarahkan oleh Craig Halkett di depan gawang.

src: The hosts were content to let Rangers play in front of them, knowing they could trouble the visitors at set pieces.
mt: Pemain tempat mereka bersedia membiarkan Rangers bermain di hadapan mereka, tahu mereka boleh menyusahkan pendatang di situasi situasi khas.

src: And that was the manner in which the crucial goal came.
mt: Dan itulah cara yang digunakan untuk menjangkau tujuan penting.

src: Rangers conceded a free-kick and Livingston worked an opening, Declan Gallagher and Robinson combining to set up Menga, who took a touch and scored from the centre of the box.
mt: Rangers membiarkan penalti dan Livingston memanfaatkan kesempatan tersebut, Declan Gallagher dan Robinson menyumbangkan bola kepada Menga, yang mengambil satu sentuhan dan mencetak gol dari tengah kotak penalti.

src: By that stage, Rangers had dominated possession but had found the home defence impenetrable and goalkeeper Liam Kelly was largely untroubled,
mt: Pada masa itu, Rangers mendominasi bola tetapi menemui pertahanan rumah yang tak terjangkau, dan penjaga bola Liam Kelly hampir tidak disinggung.

src: That pattern continued into the second half, though Alfredo Morelos did force a save from Kelly.
mt: Pola tersebut terus berlanjut ke separuh kedua, walaupun Alfredo Morelos memaksa penjaga gol Kelly membuat save.

src: Scott Pittman was denied by the feet of Rangers goalkeeper Allan McGregor and Lithgow flicked wide from another Livingston set play.
mt: Scott Pittman ditolak oleh kaki penjaga gol Rangers, Allan McGregor dan Lithgow menendang ke arah luar dari satu permainan tim Livingston.

src: Crosses continually came into the Livingston box and were continually cleared, while two penalty claims - after Halkett's challenge on substitute Glenn Middleton, and one for handball - were waved away.
mt: Pemainan kembali terus memasuki kotak gol Livingston dan terus dikeluarkan, sementara dua permohonan penalti - setelah Halkett menyerang pemain pengganti Glenn Middleton dan satu lagi untuk tindakan tangan - ditolak.

src: 'Phenomenal' from Livingston - analysis
mt: 'Fenomenal' daripada Livingston - Analisis

src: BBC Scotland's Alasdair Lamont at the Tony Macaroni Arena
mt: BBC Scotland's Alasdair Lamont di Arena Tony Macaroni

src: A phenomenal performance and result for Livingston.
mt: Kempen dan kejayaan yang luar biasa bagi Livingston.

src: To a man, they were excellent, continuing to exceed expectations on this upward trajectory.
mt: Bagi seorang lelaki, mereka adalah yang terbaik, terus melebihi pengharapan dalam arah peningkatan ini.

src: Their style of play and personnel has scarcely changed since their return to the top flight, but great credit has to go to Holt for the way he has galvanised the team since his arrival.
mt: Gaya permainan dan pemain yang dipertahankan pasukan hampir tidak berubah sejak kembali ke liga utama, tetapi kredit besar perlu diberikan kepada Holt kerana cara beliau menarik semangat pasukan sejak tiba di sana.

src: He had so many heroes.
mt: Dia mempunyai banyak penunjuk arah.

src: Captain Halkett was immense, marshalling a superbly-organised defence, while Menga kept Connor Goldson and Joe Worrall on their toes throughout.
mt: Kapten Halkett memang luar biasa, memimpin pertahanan yang terorganisasi dengan sempurna, sementara Menga selalu memaksa Connor Goldson dan Joe Worrall untuk tetap wasapada.

src: Rangers were short of inspiration, though.
mt: Rangers sedarah tidak mempunyai inspirasi.

src: As good as they have been at times under Gerrard, they fell well short of those standards.
mt: Seperti yang baik mereka telah menunjukkan pada masa-masa di bawah Gerrard, mereka gagal mencapai standard tersebut.

src: Their final ball was lacking - only once did they cut the home side open - and it is something of a wake-up call for Rangers, who find themselves in mid-table.
mt: Bola terakhir mereka kurang menarik - hanya sekali sahaja mereka membuka sempadan kepada pihak rumah - dan ianya merupakan peringatan kepada Rangers yang kini berada di tengah-tengah table.

src: Erdogan get mixed reception in Cologne
mt: Erdogan diterima secara campur dalam penganjakan di Kolon.

src: There were smiles and blue skies on Saturday (September 29) as the leaders of Turkey and Germany met for breakast in Berlin.
mt: Kemudiannya, ada senyuman dan langit biru pada hari Sabtu (29 September) ketika pemimpin Turki dan Jerman bertemu untuk sarapan di Berlin.

src: It's the last day of President Erdogan's controversial visit to Germany - which is aimed at repairing relations beteen the NATO allies.
mt: Ini adalah hari terakhir Pemimpin Erdogan berada di Jerman - yang bertujuan memulihkan hubungan antara saudara-saudara NATO.

src: They've fallen out over issues including human rights, press freedom and Turkey's accession to the EU.
mt: Mereka berpecah belah berhubung dengan isu-isu seperti hak asasi manusia, kebebasan media dan pengiktiraf Turki kepada EU.

src: Erdogan then headed for Cologne to open a giant new mosque.
mt: Erdogan lalu pergi ke Kolonia untuk membuka masjid besar yang baru.

src: The city is home to the largest Turkish population outside Turkey.
mt: Bandar itu tempat tinggal populasi Turki terbesar di luar Turkey.

src: Police cited security reasons to block a 25,000-strong crowd from gathering in front of the mosque, but plenty of supporters turned out nearby to see their president.
mt: Pihak polis menghalang seorang 25,000 orang dari berkumpul di hadapan masjid berdasarkan sebab keselamatan, tetapi banyak pendukung kehadiran di sekitar untuk melihat presiden mereka.

src: Hundreds of anti-Erdogan protesters - many of them Kurdish - also made their voices heard, condemning both Erdogan's policies and the German government's decision to welcome him to the country.
mt: Ratusan pemrotes anti-Erdogan - antara lain, mereka dari etnik Kurdish - juga menyampaikan pendirian mereka, mengecam kebijakan Erdogan dan keputusan pemerintah Jerman untuk menemuhnya di negara ini.

src: The dueling protests reflect the divisiveness of a visitor hailed as a hero by some German Turks and reviled as an autocrat by others.
mt: Protes berduel menggambarkan kebencian dalam kalangan sesorang pendatang yang disebut sebagai tokoh hero oleh sebahagian penduduk Turki di Jerman dan dihina sebagai otoriter oleh sebahagian lain.

src: Deptford road crash: Cyclist dies in collision with car
mt: Crash di Jalan Deptford: Penunggang basah mati dalam kemudi dengan kereta api

src: A cyclist has died in a collision involving a car in London.
mt: Seorang pengguna basikal telah meninggal dunia akibat kejadian taburan dengan kereta api di London.

src: The crash happened near the junction of Bestwood Street and Evelyn Street, a busy road in Deptford, in the south-east of the city, at about 10:15 BST.
mt: Keselamatan berlaku di sebelah persimpangan Jalan Bestwood dan Jalan Evelyn, jalan yang ramai di Deptford, di bahagian timur laut bandar, pada kira-kira 10:15 BST.

src: The driver of the car stopped and paramedics attended, but the man died at the scene.
mt: Pemandu kereta berhenti dan penganalisis kecemasan menghampiri, tetapi lelaki itu meninggal di tempat kejadian.

src: The crash comes months after another cyclist died in a hit-and-run on Childers Street, about a mile away from Saturday's crash.
mt: Kecahakan ini berlaku beberapa bulan selepas seorang pemandu basikal lagi meninggal dunia dalam kejadian menyerang dan melarikan diri di Jalan Childers, kira-kira sebuah mile dari kejadian kecideraan hari Sabtu.

src: The Metropolitan Police said officers were working to identify the man and inform his next-of-kin.
mt: Polis Metropolitan berkata pegawai sedang bekerja untuk mengenal pasti lelaki tersebut dan memberi maklumah kepada keluarga terdekatnya.

src: Road closures and bus diversions are in place and motorists have been advised to avoid the area.
mt: Pengangkutan jalan dan pengalihan bas telah dikeluarkan dan pengemudi telah diberi notis untuk menghindari kawasan tersebut.

src: Long Lartin prison: Six officers hurt in disorder
mt: Tahanan Long Lartin: Enam pegawai cedera dalam kekacauan

src: Six prison officers have been injured in a disturbance at a high security men's jail, the Prison Office has said.
mt: Lima pegawai tahanan telah cedera dalam kekacauan di penjara lelaki berjenama, katakan pihak Suruhanjaya Tahanan.

src: Disorder broke out at HMP Long Lartin in Worcestershire at about 09:30 BST on Sunday and is ongoing.
mt: Kacau berlaku di HMP Long Lartin di Worcestershire pada kira-kira 09:30 BST hari Ahad dan masih berlarut.

src: Specialist "Tornado" officers have been brought in to deal with the disturbance, which involves eight inmates and is contained to one wing.
mt: Pengawal "Tornado" yang specialist telah dikenakan untuk menghadapi keguruan, yang melibatkan lapan penghuni dan terhadap satu sisi.

src: The officers were treated for minor facial injuries at the scene.
mt: Pengarah diperlahankan kerana cedera muka kecil di tempat kejadian.

src: A Prison Service spokesperson said: "Specially trained prison staff have been deployed to deal with an ongoing incident at HMP Long Lartin.
mt: Penyelaras Jabatan Tahanan berkata: "Kerja-kerja terlatih dari jabatan tahanan telah ditempatkan untuk menghadapi kejadian yang sedang berlangsung di HMP Long Lartin."

src: Six members of staff have been treated for injuries.
mt: Enam pegawai telah ditangani kerana cedera.

src: We do not tolerate violence in our prisons, and are clear that those responsible will be referred to the police and could spend longer behind bars."
mt: Kita tidak menerima kekerasan di dalam penjara kita, dan jelas bahawa mereka yang bertanggungjawab akan diberi tahu polis dan mungkin akan tinggal di penjara selama lebih lama.

src: HMP Long Lartin holds more than 500 prisoners, including some of the country's most dangerous offenders.
mt: HMP Long Lartin menampung lebih daripada 500 tahanan, termasuk sebahagian daripada pelanggar hukum yang paling berbahaya dalam negara.

src: In June it was reported that the prison's governor received hospital treatment after being attacked by a prisoner.
mt: Pada Jun, dilaporkan bahawa penjaga tahanan menerima rawatan hospital setelah dikejar oleh seorang tahanan.

src: And in October last year riot officers were called to the prison to deal with a serious disturbance in which staff were attacked with pool balls.
mt: Dan pada Oktober tahun lepas, pegawai pemadam kebakaran dikesan ke penjara untuk menangani gangguan serius di mana pihak berkuasa dianiaya dengan bola kolam.

src: Hurricane Rosa Threatening Phoenix, Las Vegas, Salt Lake City With Flash Flooding (Drought Areas May Benefit)
mt: Tsunami Rosa Menyakiti Phoenix, Las Vegas, Dan Salt Lake City Dengan Banjir Singkat (Kawasan Kering Mungkin Menikmati Manfaat)

src: It's rare for a tropical depression to hit Arizona, but that's exactly what's likely to happen early happen early next week as Hurricane Rosa's remaining energy tracks across the Desert Southwest, delivering flash flooding risks.
mt: Ia jarang untuk sebuah depresi tropikal menyerang Arizona, tetapi itu adalah yang pasti akan terjadi awal minggu depan sebagai tenaga yang tinggal dari Hurricane Rosa menyeberangi Semenanjung Selatan, menyerahkan risiko banjir singkat.

src: The National Weather Service has already issued flash flood watches for Monday and Tuesday for western Arizona into southern and eastern Nevada, southeastern California and Utah, including the cities of Phoenix, Flagstaff, Las Vegas, and Salt Lake City.
mt: Setera Cuaca Negara telah menerbitkan peringatan banjir mendadak untuk hari Ahad dan Isnin bagi bahagian barat Arizona ke bahagian selatan dan timur Nevada, California Selatan Barat, dan Utah, termasuk bandar Phoenix, Flagstaff, Las Vegas, dan Salt Lake City.

src: Rosa is expected to take a direct path over Phoenix on Tuesday, approaching late Monday with rain.
mt: Rosa digunakankan untuk menyeberang secara langsung melalui Phoenix pada hari Selasa, mendekati pada akhir hari Senin dengan hujan.

src: The National Weather Service in Phoenix noted in a tweet that only "ten tropical cyclones have maintained tropical storm or depression status within 200 miles of Phoenix since 1950!
mt: Pelayaran cuaca nasional di Phoenix menunjukkan dalam tweetsnya bahawa hanya "sepuluh hujan badai tropikal telah mempertahankan status hujan badai tropikal atau depresi tropikal dalam jarak 200 mile dari Phoenix sejak 1950!"

src: Katrina (1967) was a hurricane within 40 miles of the AZ border."
mt: Katarina (1967) ialah badai hurricane dalam kawasan 40 mile dari sempadan AZ.

src: The latest National Hurricane Center models predict 2 to 4 inches of rainfall, with isolated amounts up to 6 inches in the Mogollon Rim of Arizona.
mt: Model-model pusat hujan nasional yang terkini memprediksi hujan sebanyak 2 hingga 4 inci, dengan jumlah terisolasi hingga 6 inci di Tenggara Mogollon di Arizona.

src: Other areas of the Desert Southwest including the central Rockies and the Great Basin are likely to get 1 to 2 inches, with isolated totals up to 4 inches possible.
mt: Kawasan lain di Semenanjung Pasir termasuk gunung-gunung tengah Rockies dan Basin Besar kemungkinan akan menerima 1 hingga 2 inci, dengan jumlah terisolasi hingga 4 inci.

src: For those out of flash flood risk, Rosa's rain may be a blessing since the region is drought-stricken.
mt: Bagi mereka yang tidak dalam risiko banjir pantai, hujan Rosa mungkin menjadi berkat kerana kawasan itu mengalami kekeringan.

src: Although flooding is a very serious concern, some of this rainfall will likely be beneficial since the Southwest is currently experiencing drought conditions.
mt: Walau bantuan banjir adalah masalah yang sangat serius, sebahagian daripada hujan ini mungkin memberi manfaat kerana kawasan Selatan Barat sedang mengalami kekeringan.

src: According to the U.S. Drought Monitor, just over 40 percent of Arizona is experiencing at least extreme drought, the second highest category," weather.com reported.
mt: Menurut U.S. Drought Monitor, hampir 40 peratus kawasan Arizona sedang mengalami keringat ekstrem, iaitu kategori kedua teratas, seperti dilaporkan oleh weather.com.

src: First, Hurricane Rosa's path leads to landfall across the Baja California peninsula of Mexico.
mt: Pertama, laluan huru-huru Rosa menjejari tanah di pesisir Baja California, Meksiko.

src: Rosa, still at hurricane strength Sunday morning with maximum winds of 85 miles per hour, is 385 miles south of Punta Eugenia, Mexico and moving north at 12 miles per hour.
mt: Rosa, masih berkuasa hurricane pada pagi hari Ahad dengan angin maksimum 85 mph, berada 385 mile selatan Puerto Eugenia, Mexico dan bergerak ke utara dengan laju 12 mph.

src: The storm is encountering cooler waters in the Pacific and therefore powering down.
mt: Badai menemui air yang lebih sejuk di Pasifik dan akibatnya menurunkan kekuatannya.

src: Thus, it's expected to make landfall in Mexico at tropical storm strength in the afternoon or evening on Monday.
mt: Sehingga, disperkiraan bahawa badai tropikal akan menerjang Mexico pada waktu tengah hari atau malam pada hari Isnin.

src: Rainfall across portions of Mexico could be heavy, posing a significant flooding risk.
mt: Hujan di beberapa bahagian Meksiko mungkin hujan lebat, memberi risiko banjir yang tinggi.

src: "Rainfall totals of 3 to 6 inches are expected from Baja California into northwestern Sonora, with up to 10 inches possible," weather.com reported.
mt: "Kadar hujan antara 3 hingga 6 inci diperkirakan dari Baja California ke northwest Sonora, dengan kemungkinan hingga 10 inci," lapor weather.com.

src: Rosa will then track north across Mexico as a tropical storm before reaching the Arizona border in the early morning hours Tuesday as a tropical depression, which will then track up through Arizona and into southern Utah by late Tuesday night.
mt: Rosa akan kemudian bergerak ke utara melalui Mexico sebagai badai tropikal sebelum tiba di perbatasan Arizona pada jam pagi hari Selasa sebagai depresi tropikal, yang kemudian akan bergerak ke utara melalui Arizona dan masuk ke utara Utah pada malam hari Selasa yang terakhir.

src: "The main hazard expected from Rosa or its remnants is very heavy rainfall in Baja California, northwestern Sonora, and the U.S. Desert Southwest," the National Hurricane Center said.
mt: "Keselamatan utama yang dijangkakan daripada Rosa atau sisa-sisaannya ialah hujan lebat di Baja California, pihak utara Sonora, dan Wilayah Semenanjung Amerika Utara," kata Pusat Hurricane Negara.

src: These rains are expected to produce life-threatening flash flooding and debris flows in the deserts, and landslides in mountainous terrain.
mt: Hujan ini dijangka akan menghasilkan banjir mendadak dan aliran benda-benda di padang pasir, serta landslide di kawasan lereng gunung.

src: Midsomer Norton attack: Four attempted murder arrests
mt: Serangan Midsomer Norton: Empat tahanan cuba pembunuhan

src: Three teenage boys and a 20-year-old man have been arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after a 16-year-old was found with stab wounds in Somerset.
mt: Tiga lelaki muda dan seorang lelaki berusia 20 tahun ditahan atas kesalahan cuba membunuh selepas seorang lelaki berusia 16 tahun ditemui dengan luka menusuk di Somerset.

src: The teenage boy was found injured in the Excelsior Terrace area of Midsomer Norton, at about 04:00 BST on Saturday.
mt: Boy muda ditemui cedera di kawasan Excelsior Terrace, Midsomer Norton pada kira-kira 04:00 BST hari Sabtu.

src: He was taken to hospital where he remains in a "stable" condition.
mt: Dia dihantar ke hospital di mana dia masih dalam keadaan "stabil".

src: A 17-year-old, two 18-year-olds and a 20-year-old man were arrested overnight in the Radstock area, Avon and Somerset Police said.
mt: Satu lelaki 17 tahun, dua lelaki 18 tahun dan seorang lelaki 20 tahun ditahan pada malam hari di kawasan Radstock, kata polis Avon dan Somerset.

src: Officers have appealed for anyone who may have any mobile phone footage of what happened to come forward.
mt: Pihak berkuasa telah meminta orang yang mungkin memilikikan rakaman telefon pintar tentang kejadian itu untuk menyatakan kehadiran mereka.

src: Trump says Kavanaugh 'suffered, the meanness, the anger' of the Democratic Party
mt: Trump berkata Kavanaugh 'mengalami, kebencian, kemarahan' parti Demokrat.

src: "A vote for Judge Kavanaugh is a vote to reject the ruthless and outrageous tactics of the Democratic Party," Trump said at a rally in Wheeling, West Virginia.
mt: "Voting untuk Mahkamah Kavanaugh adalah menghina taktik tidak adil dan tidak beradab Parti Demokrat," kata Trump semasa ceramah di Wheeling, West Virginia.

src: Trump said that Kavanaugh has "suffered the meanness, the anger" of the Democratic Party throughout his nomination process.
mt: Trump berkata bahawa Kavanaugh telah "menanggung kebencian dan kesedihan parti Demokrat" semasa proses penjagatannya.

src: Kavanaugh testified before Congress on Thursday, forcefully and emotionally denying an allegation from Christine Blasey Ford that he sexually assaulted her decades ago when they were teenagers.
mt: Kavanaugh menyatakan pendapat di hadapan Kongres pada hari Jumat, secara tegas dan emosional menyangkal dakwaan Christine Blasey Ford yang menyatakan bahawa dia menyalahgunakan seksnya berpuluh-puluh tahun dulu ketika mereka masih kanak-kanak.

src: Ford also testified at the hearing about her allegation.
mt: Ford juga saksi di majlis dengar rayan tentang tuduhannya.

src: The President said on Saturday that the "American people saw the brilliant and quality and courage" of Kavanaugh that day.
mt: Presiden berkata pada hari Sabtu bahawa "rakyat Amerika melihat kecerdasan, kualiti dan berani" Kavanaugh pada hari tersebut.

src: "A vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh is a vote to confirm one of the most accomplished legal minds of our time, a jurist with a sterling record of public service," he told the crowd of West Virginia supporters.
mt: Beliau berkata kepada kumpulan pendukung West Virginia, "Vote untuk mengesahkan Hakim Kavanaugh adalah vote untuk mengesahkan salah satu tokoh hukum terhebat dalam masa kini, seorang hakim dengan rekod cemerlang dalam khidmat umum."

src: The President obliquely referred to Kavanaugh's nomination while talking about the importance of Republican turnout in the midterm elections.
mt: Presiden menyentuh secara tidak langsung kepengaruan Kavanaugh dalam pemilihan tengah semasa membincangkan pentingnya kehadiran calon kumpulan Republik.

src: "Five weeks away from one of the most important elections in our lifetimes.
mt: Lima minggu menjelang salah satu pilihan raya terpenting dalam sejarah kami.

src: I'm not running, but I'm really running," he said.
mt: "aku tidak berjalan, tetapi benar-benar berjalan," katanya.

src: "That's why I'm all over the place fighting for great candidates."
mt: Itulah sebabnya saya mempertahankan pelamar terbaik.

src: Trump argued that Democrats are on a mission to "resist and obstruct."
mt: Trump berargumen bahawa Demokrat berada dalam misi untuk "menentang dan menghalang."

src: The first key procedural vote on the Senate floor on Kavanaugh's nomination is expected to take place no later than Friday, a senior GOP leadership aide has told CNN.
mt: Sebuah undangan pemilihan prosedural pertama di papan Senat mengenai calon Kavanaugh diharapkan akan berlangsung tidak lebih lambat dari hari Jumat, demikian dikatakan kepada CNN oleh seorang asisten kepemimpinan GOP senior.

src: Hundreds killed by Indonesian quake, tsunami, with toll seen rising
mt: Ratusan mati akibat gempa Indonesia, tsunami, dengan jumlah korban diperkirakan meningkat

src: At least 384 people were killed, many swept away as giant waves crashed onto beaches, when a major earthquake and tsunami hit the Indonesian island of Sulawesi, authorities said on Saturday.
mt: Pihak berkuasa mengatakan pada hari Sabtu bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 384 orang telah meninggal dunia, ramai di antara mereka terbawa oleh arus besar apabila gempa bumi besar dan tsunami menyerang pulau Sulawesi di Indonesia.

src: Hundreds of people had gathered for a festival on the beach in the city of Palu on Friday when waves as high as six meters (18 feet) smashed onshore at dusk, sweeping many to their deaths and destroying anything in their path.
mt: Ratusan orang telah berkumpul untuk sebuah perayaan di pantai bandar Palu pada hari Jumaat ketika gelombang yang tingginya sebanyak enam meter (18 kaki) menyerang tanah di malam hari, menawan banyak orang dan memusnahkan apa-apa yang berada di sepanjang jalannya.

src: The tsunami followed a 7.5 magnitude earthquake.
mt: Tsunami mengikuti gempa bumi berkekuatan 7.5.

src: "When the tsunami threat arose yesterday, people were still doing their activities on the beach and did not immediately run and they became victims," Sutopo Purwo Nugroho, the spokesman for Indonesia's disaster mitigation agency BNPB said in a briefing in Jakarta.
mt: "Bila ancaman tsunami muncul semalam, orang-orang masih melakukan aktivitas di pantai dan tidak langsung terburu-buru berlari, akibatnya mereka menjadi korban," kata Sutopo Purwo Nugroho, penjawab dari badan penanggulangan bencana Indonesia BNPB dalam sebuah rundingan di Jakarta.

src: "The tsunami didn't come by itself, it dragged cars, logs, houses, it hit everything on land," Nugroho said, adding that the tsunami had traveled across the open sea at speeds of 800 kph (497 mph) before striking the shoreline.
mt: "Nugroho berkata, 'Bencana tsunami itu tidak muncul sendiri, ia menarik kereta, kayu, rumah, dan menyerang segala sesuatu di daratan,' menambahkan bahawa tsunami itu telah bergerak melalui lautan terbuka dengan laju 800 km/jam (497 mph) sebelum menyerang tepi pantai."

src: Some people climbed trees to escape the tsunami and survived, he said.
mt: Beberapa orang memanjat pohon untuk melari daripada tsunami dan selamat, katanya.

src: Around 16,700 people were evacuated to 24 centers in Palu.
mt: Kira-kira 16,700 orang ditolak ke 24 pusat di Palu.

src: Aerial photographs released by the disaster agency showed many buildings and shops destroyed, bridges twisted and collapsed and a mosque surrounded by water.
mt: Gambar udara yang dikeluarkan oleh agency bencana menunjukkan banyak bangunan dan toko yang rusak, jembatan yang melengkung dan runtuh, dan masjid yang dikelilingi air.

src: Aftershocks continued to rock the coastal city on Saturday.
mt: Getarans pasca gempa terus menggemparkan bandar pantai pada hari Sabtu.

src: The series of earthquakes were felt in an area with 2.4 million people.
mt: Serangkaian gempa bumi dirasakan di sebuah kawasan yang mempunyai 2.4 juta penduduk.

src: Indonesia's Agency for the Assessment and Application of Technology (BPPT) said in statement the energy released by Friday's massive quake was around 200 times the power of the atomic bomb dropped on Hiroshima in World War Two.
mt: Biro Penilaian dan Penerapan Teknologi Indonesia (BPPT) menyatakan dalam pernyataan bahawa tenaga yang dilepaskan oleh gempa besar hari Jumaat adalah sekitar 200 kali daya atom bom yang diturunkan di Hiroshima semasa Perang Dunia Kedua.

src: The geography of the city, which sits at the end of a long, narrow bay, could have magnified the size of the tsunami, it said.
mt: Geografi bandar yang terletak di hujung bahang yang panjang dan sempit boleh menambahkan saiz tsunami, katanya.

src: Nugroho described the damage as "extensive" and said thousands of houses, hospitals, shopping malls and hotels had collapsed.
mt: Nugroho menggambarkan kecederaan sebagai "menyeluruh" dan berkata ribuan rumah, hospital, pusat belanja dan hotel telah runtuh.

src: Bodies of some victims were found trapped under the rubble of collapsed buildings, he said, adding 540 people were injured and 29 were missing.
mt: Maya-maya sebahagian mangsa ditemui terjepit di bawah rubuh bangunan yang runtuh, katanya, menambah 540 orang cedera dan 29 orang hilang.

src: Nugroho said the casualties and the damage could be greater along the coastline 300 km (190 miles) north of Palu, an area called Donggala, which is closer to the epicenter of the quake.
mt: Nugroho menyatakan bahawa jumlah mangsa dan kerugian mungkin lebih tinggi di sepanjang pesisir 300 km (190 miles) utara Palu, iaitu kawasan Donggala, yang lebih dekat ke lokasi pusat gempa.

src: Communications "were totally crippled with no information" from Donggala, Nugroho said.
mt: Pengkomunikasian "telah sepenuhnya dimatikan dengan tidak ada maklumat" daripada Donggala, kata Nugroho.

src: There are more than 300,000 people living there," the Red Cross said in a statement, adding that its staff and volunteers were heading to the affected areas.
mt: "Ada lebih dari 300,000 orang yang tinggal di sana," kata Red Cross dalam satu kenyataan, menambahkan bahawa kakitangan dan sukarelawan mereka sedang bergerak ke kawasan yang terjejas.

src: "This is already a tragedy, but it could get much worse," it said.
mt: "Ini sudah menjadi keganasan, tetapi ia boleh memburuk lagi," kata ia.

src: The agency on Saturday was widely criticized for not informing that a tsunami had hit Palu, though officials said waves had come within the time the warning was issued.
mt: Pihak berwenang dikejutkan pada hari Sabtu kerana tidak memberi tahu bahawa gelombang tsunami telah menyerang Palu, walaupun pegawai mengatakan gelombang telah tiba dalam tempoh masa yang diberi sebagai peringatan.

src: In amateur footage shared on social media a man on the upper floor of a building can be heard shouting frantic warnings of the approaching tsunami to people on the street below.
mt: Dalam rakaman amatan yang berkongsi di media sosial, seorang lelaki di lantai atas sebuah bangunan dapat didengari mengucapkan peringatan tergesa-gesa mengenai tsunami yang hampir tiba kepada orang-orang di bawah bangunan.

src: Within minutes a wall of water crashes onto the shore, carrying away buildings and cars.
mt: Dalam masa sekejap, dinding air melanda pantai, membawa pergi bangunan dan kereta.

src: Reuters was not able to immediately authenticate the footage.
mt: Reuters tidak mampu memastikan kebenaran gambar tersebut secara langsung.

src: The quake and tsunami caused a major power outage that cut communications around Palu making it difficult for authorities to coordinate rescue efforts.
mt: Beban gempa dan tsunami menyebabkan kemudiannya kejadian padam elektrik yang memutuskan komunikasi di sekitar Palu, menjadikan ia sukar untuk koordinasi usaha penyelamat.

src: The military has started sending in cargo planes with aid from Jakarta and other cities, authorities said, but evacuees still badly need food and other basic necessities.
mt: Pasukan militer telah mula menghantar pesawat pengangkut bahan bantu dari Jakarta dan kota-kota lain, kata pihak berwenang, tetapi penduduk yang terjejas masih memerlukan makanan dan keperluan asasi lain.

src: The city's airport has been reopened only for relief efforts and will remain closed until Oct.
mt: Lapangan terbang bandar itu telah dibuka semula hanya untuk usaha pemulihan dan akan tetap ditutup hingga Oktober.

src: President Joko Widodo was scheduled to visit evacuation centers in Palu on Sunday.
mt: Presiden Joko Widodo telah dijadwalkan mengunjungi pusat evakuasi di Palu pada hari Ahad.

src: Indonesia Tsunami Toll Soars Above 800.
mt: Indonesia Tsunami Korban Meningkat Melebihi 800.

src: It Is Very Bad.
mt: Ia sangat buruk.

src: While World Vision's staff from Donggala have made it safely to Palu city, where employees are sheltering in tarpaulin shelters set up in the courtyard of their office, they passed scenes of devastation on the way, Mr. Doseba said.
mt: Sambil pegawai World Vision dari Donggala berjaya sampai ke bandar Palu, di mana pekerja-pekerja melindungi diri di bawah tenda-tenda yang diatur di taman kantornya, mereka melihat kejadian-kejadian yang merusakkan, kata Tuan Doseba.

src: "They told me they saw lots of houses that were destroyed," he said.
mt: "Mereka cakap diaorang nampak banyak rumah yang hancur," kata dia.

src: It is very bad.
mt: Ia sangat buruk.

src: Even as aid groups began the grim motions of starting the gears of disaster relief, some complained that foreign aid workers with deep expertise were being prevented from traveling to Palu.
mt: Seorang sebahagian daripada kelompok bantuan memulakan langkah-langkah yang menyedarkan bahawa bantuan asing dengan keahlian mendalam diberi larangan untuk menjelajah ke Palu.

src: According to Indonesian regulations, funding, supplies and staffing from overseas can only start flowing if the site of a calamity is declared a national disaster zone.
mt: Menurut peraturan Indonesia, penghimpunan dana, bantuan dan tenaga dari luar hanya boleh dimulai jika lokasi bencana diumumkan sebagai kawasan bencana nasional.

src: That has not happened yet.
mt: Itu belum berlaku.

src: "It's still a province level disaster," said Aulia Arriani, a spokesperson for the Indonesian Red Cross.
mt: "Itu masih bencana di peringkat provinsi," kata Aulia Arriani, penyelamat bagi Indonesia Merah.

src: "Once the government says, "O.K., this is a national disaster," we can open for international assistance but there's no status yet."
mt: "Setelah kerajaan mengatakan, 'Okay, ini adalah bencana nasional,' kita boleh membuka untuk bantuan antar bangsa, tetapi statusnya belum ada."

src: As the second night fell on Palu after Friday's earthquake and tsunami, friends and family of those still missing were holding out hope that their loved ones would be the miracles that leaven the bleak story lines of natural disasters.
mt: Saat malam kedua menghampiri Palu selepas gempa dan tsunami pada hari Jumat, keluarga dan teman-teman yang masih mencari keselamatan berharap bahawa orang yang dicintai mereka akan menjadi keajaiban yang memperbaiki kisah-kisah mengerikan mengenai bencana alam.

src: On Saturday, a little boy was plucked from a sewer.
mt: Pada hari Sabtu, seorang kanak-kanak kecil diambil daripada saluran sampah.

src: On Sunday, rescuers freed a woman who had been pinned under rubble for two days with the body of her mother next to her.
mt: Pada hari Sunday, penceraih melepaskan seorang wanita yang telah ditimbus di bawah runtuhan selama dua hari dengan mayat ibunya berhampiran dengannya.

src: Gendon Subandono, the coach of the Indonesian national paragliding team, had trained two of the missing paragliders for the Asian Games, which wrapped up earlier this month in Indonesia.
mt: Pemandu pasukan paragliding negara Indonesia, Gendon Subandono, telah melatih dua daripada peserta paragliding yang hilang untuk Sukan Asia, yang berakhir pada bulan ini di Indonesia.

src: Others of those trapped at the Roa Roa Hotel, Mr. Mandagi included, were his students.
mt: Orang-orang lain yang terjebak di Hotel Roa Roa, termasuk Tuan Mandagi, ialah murid-muridnya.

src: "As a senior in the paragliding field, I have my own emotional burden," he said.
mt: "Sebagai senior dalam bidang paragliding, saya mempunai tanggungjawab emosi sendiri," katanya.

src: Mr. Gendon recounted how, in the hours after the news of the Roa Roa Hotel collapse circulated among the paragliding community, he had desperately sent WhatsApp messages to the Palu competitors, who were taking part in the beach festival.
mt: Mangkin Gendon menceritakan bagaimana, dalam jam-jam selepas berita tentang kejatuhan Hotel Roa Roa menyebar di kalangan komuniti paragliding, dia telah membuang pesan WhatsApp kepada peserta lumba Palu yang menjalani acara festival pantai.

src: His messages, though, only resulted in one gray check mark, rather than a pair of blue checks.
mt: Pesan-pesannya, walaupun demikian, hanya menghasilkan satu tanda cek cokelat, bukan pasangan tanda cek biru.

src: "I think that means the messages were not delivered," he said.
mt: "K他认为那意味着讯息未被送达。"

src: Thieves take $26,750 during ATM refill at Newport on the Levee
mt: Penjamban mengambil $26,750 semasa pengisian ATM di Newport di atas Levee

src: Thieves on Friday morning stole $26,750 from a Brink's worker refilling an ATM at Newport on the Levee, according to a news release from the Newport Police Department.
mt: Berdasarkan satu pengumuman media, seorang pekerja Brink's yang menyemai mesin ATM di Newport pada levee telah menyerahkan $26,750 kepada para pencuri pada pagi hari.

src: The car's driver had been emptying an ATM in the entertainment complex and preparing to deliver more money, Det. Dennis McCarthy wrote in the release.
mt: Pemain kereta telah mengejutkan ATM di kompleks hiburan dan bersiap menghantar lebih banyak wang, tulis Detektif Dennis McCarthy dalam penerbitan itu.

src: While he was occupied, another man "ran up from behind the Brink's employee" and stole a bag of money meant for delivery.
mt: Sementara dia sedang terlibat, seorang lelaki lain "muncul dari belakang pekerja Brink's" dan mengekstrak beg sekotak duit yang dimaksudkan untuk dibawa.

src: Witnesses spotted multiple suspects fleeing the scene, according to the release, but police did not specify the number involved in the incident.
mt: Saksi memantau beberapa ketua yang melarikan diri dari tempat kejadian, menurut pernyataan, tetapi polis tidak menetapkan jumlah yang terlibat dalam kejadian tersebut.

src: Anyone with information about their identities should contact Newport police at 859-292-3680.
mt: Siapa saja yang mempunya maklumat mengenai pengenalan mereka seharusnya menghubungi polis Newport pada nombor 859-292-3680.

src: Kanye West: Rapper changes his name to Ye
mt: Kanye West: Penyanyi berubah nama kepada Ye

src: Rapper Kanye West is changing his name - to Ye.
mt: Rapper Kanye West berubah nama - kepada Ye.

src: Announcing the change on Twitter on Saturday, he wrote: "The being formally known as Kanye West."
mt: Mengumumkan perubahan pada hari Sabtu di Twitter, dia menulis: "Kanye West yang secara resmi dikenal sebagai."

src: West, 41, has been nicknamed Ye for some time and used the moniker as the title for his eighth album, which was released in June.
mt: West, 41, telah dikenali sebagai Ye selama beberapa masa dan menggunakan moniker ini sebagai tajuk album kedelapannya yang dikeluarkan pada Jun.

src: The change comes ahead of his appearance on Saturday Night Live, where he is expected to launch his new album Yandhi.
mt: Perubahan ini berlaku sebelum kehadirannya di Saturday Night Live, di mana dia disiapkan untuk meluncurkan album barunya, Yandhi.

src: He replaces singer Ariana Grande on the show who cancelled for "emotional reasons," the show's creator said.
mt: Dia menggantikan penyanyi Ariana Grande dalam acara tersebut yang membatalkan acara tersebut untuk "sebab emosional," kata kreator acara.

src: As well as being an abbreviation of his current professional name, West has previously said the word has religious significance for him.
mt: Selain menjadi singkatan daripada nama profesionalnya yang sekarang, West telah berkata sebelum ini bahawa kata ini mempunyai makna agama baginya.

src: "I believe 'ye' is the most commonly used word in the Bible, and in the Bible it means 'you,'" West said earlier this year, discussing his album title with radio host Big Boy.
mt: " saya percaya 'ye' adalah kata yang paling sering digunakan dalam Alkitab, dan dalam Alkitab, 'ye' berarti 'kamu,' " kata West semasa membincangkan albumnya dengan penyanyi radio Big Boy.

src: "So I'm you, I'm us, it's us.
mt: Jadi aku adalahmu, aku adalah kami, itu kami.

src: It went from Kanye, which means the only one, to just Ye - just being a reflection of our good, our bad, our confused, everything.
mt: Ia bermula daripada Kanye, yang bermaksud satu-satunya, ke hanya Ye - hanya sebagai refleksi daripada kita yang baik, buruk, bimbang, segala sesuatu.

src: The album is more of a reflection of who we are."
mt: Album ini lebih menyerupai refleksi diri kita.

src: He is one of a number of famous rappers to change their name.
mt: Beliau antara sejumlah penyanyi lagu yang terkenal yang mengubah nama mereka.

src: Sean Combs has been variously known as Puff Daddy, P. Diddy or Diddy, but this year announced his preference for the names Love and Brother Love.
mt: Sean Combs dikenal sebagai Puff Daddy, P. Diddy atau Diddy, tetapi tahun ini mengumumkan preferensinya untuk nama-nama Love dan Brother Love.

src: A former West collaborator, JAY-Z, has also made do with or without a hyphen and capitals.
mt: Koeter lama West, JAY-Z, juga telah menyesuaikan diri dengan atau tanpa tanda hubung dan huruf kapital.

src: Mexico's AMLO vows not to use military against civilians
mt: Presiden Mexico, AMLO, berjanji tidak menggunakan tentera melawan rakyat awam.

src: Mexican President-elect Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador has vowed to never use military force against civilians as the country approaches the 50th anniversary of a bloody reprisal against students.
mt: Presiden Mexico yang terpilih, Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, telah berjanji tidak akan menggunakan kekuatan militer terhadap rakyat awam semasa negara mendekati 50 tahun kemarin dari tindakan balas duka terhadap pelajar.

src: Lopez Obrador promised Saturday at Tlatelolco Plaza to "never ever use the military to repress the Mexican people."
mt: Lopez Obrador menjanjakan pada hari Sabat di Tlatelolco Plaza untuk "tidak pernah lagi menggunakan tentera untuk menekan rakyat Meksiko."

src: Troops fired on a peaceful demonstration at the plaza on Oct. 2, 1968, killing as many as 300 people at a time when leftist student movements were taking root throughout Latin America.
mt: Pasukan menyerang satu demonstrasi yang damai di tengah taman pada 2 Oktober 1968, membunuh sebanyak 300 orang pada masa ketika gerakan pemuda kiri sedang berkembang di seluruh Amerika Latin.

src: Lopez Obrador has pledged to support young Mexicans by giving monthly subsidies to those who study and opening more free public universities.
mt: Lopez Obrador telah berjanji akan memberi pendanaan bulanan kepada mereka yang belajar serta membuka lebih banyak universiti awam percuma.

src: He has said that unemployment and a lack of educational opportunities draws youth to criminal gangs.
mt: Beliau telah menyatakan bahawa ketidakpekaan dan kekurangan peluang pendidikan menarik remaja ke dalam pasukan kriminal.

src: U.S. should double A.I. funding
mt: A.S. sepatutnya menaikkan pendanaan A.I.

src: As China becomes more active in artificial intelligence, the U.S. should double the amount it spends on research in the field, says investor and AI practitioner Kai-Fu Lee, who has worked for Google, Microsoft and Apple.
mt: Kai-Fu Lee, peninvestor dan praktikan AI, mengatakan bahawa Amerika Syarikat sepatut meng удвоить jumlah wang yang dihabiskan dalam riset dalam bidang ini, mengikut keupayaan China semakin aktif dalam kecerdasan buatan.

src: The comments come after various parts of the U.S. government have made AI announcements, even as the U.S. overall lacks a formal AI strategy.
mt: Komen-komen ini datang setelah berbagai bahagian dalam kerajaan Amerika Syarikat telah membuat pengumuman mengenai AI, bahkan ketika keseluruhan Amerika Syarikat tidak mempunyai strategi rasmi mengenai AI.

src: Meanwhile, China introduced its plan last year: it's aiming to be No.1 in AI innovation by 2030.
mt: Sejak itu, China memperkenalkan plannya tahun lepas: ia bertujuan menjadi No.1 dalam inovasi AI pada 2030.

src: "Double the AI research budget would be a good start, given that all other countries are so much farther behind U.S., and we're looking for the next breakthrough in AI," said Lee.
mt: "Kembara dana penelitian AI diperdolikan dua kali akan menjadi awal yang baik, kerana semua negara lain jauh lebih tertinggal daripada Amerika, dan kami mencari kemajuan berikutnya dalam AI," kata Lee.

src: Doubling funding could double the chances that the next big AI achievement will be made in the U.S., Lee told CNBC in an interview this week.
mt: Kemungkinan bahawa pencapaian AI yang besar berikutnya akan dilakukan di AS mungkin akan dikalakan dua jika pendanaan dinaikkan dua kali, kata Lee kepada CNBC dalam satu wawancara minggu ini.

src: Lee, whose book "AI Superpowers: China, Silicon Valley and the New World Order" was published this month by Houghton Mifflin Harcourt, is CEO of Sinovation Ventures, which has invested in one of the most prominent AI companies in China, Face++.
mt: Lee, yang buku "AI Superpowers: China, Silicon Valley dan New World Order" diterbitkan bulan ini oleh Houghton Mifflin Harcourt, adalah CEO Sinovation Ventures, yang telah menanamkan modal dalam salah satu syarikat AI terkenal di China, Face++.

src: In the 1980s at Carnegie Mellon University he worked on an AI system that beat the highest-ranked American Othello player, and later he was an executive at Microsoft Research and president of Google's China branch.
mt: Pada 1980an, beliau bekerja pada sistem AI yang mampu menang atas pemain Othello terbaik di Amerika, kemudian beliau menjadi ketua bahagian penelitian Microsoft dan presiden cabang Google di China.

src: Lee acknowledged previous U.S. government technology competitions like the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency's Robotics Challenge and asked when the next one would be, in order to help identify the next visionaries.
mt: Lee mengakui pertandingan teknologi kerajaan Amerika Syarikat yang sebelumnya seperti Pertandingan Robotik Agency Penyelidikan Penyelidikan Lanjutan Pertahanan dan menanya bila kali berikutnya akan diadakan, supaya membantu mengenal pasti pengembara berikutnya.

src: Researchers in the U.S. often have to work hard in order to win government grants, Lee said.
mt: Kerja keras diperlukan oleh peneliti di Amerika untuk menang secara berkesan mengambilkan pihak kerajaan, kata Lee.

src: "It's not China that is taking away the academic leaders; it's the corporates," Lee said.
mt: "Kurangnya pemimpin akademik bukanlah akibat China, tetapi kerana perusahaan," kata Lee.

src: Facebook, Google and other technology companies have hired luminaries from universities to work on AI in recent years.
mt: Perkhidmatan Facebook, Google dan syarikat teknologi lain telah menunjuk kan ahli-ahli besar daripada universiti untuk bekerja dalam bidang AI dalam beberapa tahun terakhir.

src: Lee said immigration policy changes could also help the U.S. bolster its AI efforts.
mt: Lee berkata perubahan kebijakan imigrasi boleh membantu Amerika memperkuat usahanya dalam bidang AI.

src: "I think green cards should automatically be offered to PhD's in AI," he said.
mt: "aku rasa kad hijau sepatutnya diberikan secara automatik kepada pelajar PhD dalam bidang AI," katanya.

src: China's State Council issued its Next Generation Artificial Intelligence Development Plan in July 2017.
mt: Kementerian Perdana Negara Tiongkok mengumumkan Plan Pembangunan Intelligence Buatan Generasi Berikutnya pada Julai 2017.

src: China's National Natural Science Foundation provides funding to people at academic institutions similar to the way that the National Science Foundation and other government organizations dole out money to U.S. researchers, but the quality of academic work is lower in China, Lee said.
mt: Dasar Negeri Sains Alam China menajaan dana kepada individu di institusi akademik secara serupa dengan cara Dasar Sains Negeri dan organisasi kerajaan lain menajaan dana kepada penyelidah di AS, tetapi kualiti kerja akademik lebih rendah di China, kata Lee.

src: Earlier this year the U.S. Defense Department established a Joint Artificial Intelligence Center, which is meant to involve partners from industry and academia, and the White House announced the formation of Select Committee on Artificial Intelligence.
mt: Tahun lepas, Kementerian Pertahanan Amerika Syarikat mendirikan pusat kecerdasan buatan bersama, yang bertujuan memperkukuh kerjasama antara industri dan akademik, dan Istana Merah mengumumkan pembentukan Komite Pemilihan Kecerdasan Bukan Manusia.

src: And this month DARPA announced a $2 billion investment in an initiative called AI Next.
mt: Dan bulan ini DARPA memberi khabar bahawa memetik sebanyak $2 bilion dalam satu inisiatif yang dikenali sebagai AI Next.

src: As for the NSF, it currently invests more than $100 million per year in AI research.
mt: Menyentuh NSF, ia currently menyerahkan lebih daripada $100 million setahun dalam riset AI.

src: Meanwhile, U.S. legislation that sought to create a National Security Commission on Artificial Intelligence has not seen action in months.
mt: Sejak beberapa bulan, undang-undang Amerika Syarikat yang cuba menciptakan Komisi Keselamatan Negara Pintar telah tidak memperoleh tindakan.

src: Macedonians vote in referendum on whether to change country's name
mt: Makedon orang vote dalam referendum untuk menentukan sama ada negara akan mengubah nama negara.

src: The people of Macedonia voted in a referendum on Sunday on whether to change its name to "Republic of North Macedonia," a move that would resolve a decades-old dispute with Greece which had blocked its membership bids for the European Union and NATO.
mt: Rakyat Macedonia memilih dalam satu referendum pada hari Ahad untuk menentukan sama ada mereka akan mengubah nama negaranya menjadi "Republik Macedonia Utara", langkah yang akan menyelesaikan perselisihan berdekadadakan dengan Greece yang telah menghalang permohonan keangkatan mereka ke dalam Persekutuan Europe dan NATO.

src: Greece, which has a province called Macedonia, maintains that its northern neighbor's name represents a claim on its territory and has vetoed its entrance into NATO and the EU.
mt: Greece, yang mempunyai negeri bagian yang dikenali sebagai Macedonia, menegaskan bahawa nama tetangga utaranya mewakili klaim terhadap tanahnya dan telah menasihati masuknya ke dalam NATO dan EU.

src: The two governments struck a deal in June based on the proposed new name, but nationalist opponents argue the change would undermine the ethnic identity of Macedonia's Slavic majority population.
mt: Pihak penting dua menandatangani perjanjian berdasarkan nama baru yang ditawarkan, tetapi pihak-pihak yang berkecimpung dalam kebencian menganggap perubahan ini akan merosotkan identiti etnik majoriti Makedon berbangsa Slavia.

src: President Gjorge Ivanov has said he will not be voting in the referendum and a boycott campaign has cast doubts on whether turnout will meet the minimum 50 percent required for the referendum to be valid.
mt: Presiden Gjorge Ivanov telah berkata beliau tidak akan memilih dalam pemilihan umum dan satu kampanye pemungutan dana telah memicu keraguan sama ada jumlah pengunjung akan mencapai 50 peratus minimum yang diperlukan untuk pemilihan umum itu sah.

src: The question on the referendum ballot read: "Are you for NATO and EU membership with acceptance of the agreement with Greece."
mt: Soal dalam pemilihan raya mengenai referendum bertulis: "Adakah anda mendukung keanggotaan NATO dan EU dengan menerima perjanjian dengan Greece."

src: Supporters of the name change, including Prime Minister Zoran Zaev, argue that it is a price worth paying to pursue admission into bodies such as the EU and NATO for Macedonia, one of the countries to emerge from the collapse of Yugoslavia.
mt: Pendukung perubahan nama, termasuk Perdana Menteri Zoran Zaev, berargumen bahawa ini adalah harga yang perlu dibayar untuk memperoleh keahlian dalam organisasi seperti EU dan NATO, salah satu negara yang muncul daripada kehancuran Yugoslavia.

src: "I came today to vote for the future of the country, for young people in Macedonia so they can be live freely under the umbrella of the European Union because it means safer lives for all of us," said Olivera Georgijevska, 79, in Skopje.
mt: "Kami datang hari ini untuk memilih bagi masa depan negara, bagi penduduk muda di Makedonia supaya mereka boleh hidup bebas di bawah selimut Union Eropah kerana ini bermaksud kehidupan yang lebih aman untuk semua kami," kata Olivera Georgijevska, 79, di Skopje.

src: Although not legally binding, enough members of parliament have said they will abide by the vote's outcome to make it decisive.
mt: Meskipun bukan bersifat sah hukum, cukup anggota parlimen telah menyatakan bahawa mereka akan patuh kepada keputusan undangan untuk menjadikannya penting.

src: The name change would requires a two-thirds majority in parliament.
mt: Perubahan nama memerlukan majoriti dua pertiga di parlimen.

src: The state election commission said there had been no reports of irregularities by 1 p.m.
mt: Komisyen pilihan raya negeri mengesyaki tidak ada laporan mengenai ketidaknormalan hingga 1.00 tengahari.

src: However, turnout stood at only 16 percent, compared to 34 percent in last parliamentary election in 2016 when 66 percent of the registered voters cast their ballot.
mt: Namun, jumlah pengundi hanya mencapai 16 peratus, berbanding 34 peratus dalam pilihan raya parlimen tahun 2016 lalu ketika 66 peratus pengundi terdaftar memilih.

src: "I came out to vote because of my children, our place is in Europe," said Gjose Tanevski, 62, a voter in the capital, Skopje.
mt: "Kami keluar untuk memilih kerana anak-anak kami, tempat kami berada di Eropah," kata Gjose Tanevski, 62, seorang pemilih di Skopje.

src: Macedonia's PM Zoran Zaev, his wife Zorica and his son Dushko cast their ballot for the referendum in Macedonia on changing the country's name that would open the way for it to join NATO and the European Union in Strumica, Macedonia September 30, 2018.
mt: Pemakani Macedonia Zoran Zaev, isterinya Zorica dan putranya Dushko menyelesaikan pengundian untuk pemilihan raya di Macedonia pada 30 September 2018, untuk mengubah nama negara yang akan membuka jalan ke NATO dan Uni Eropah.

src: In front of parliament in Skopje, Vladimir Kavardarkov, 54, was preparing a small stage and pulling up chairs in front of tents set up by those who will boycott the referendum.
mt: Di hadapan parlimen di Skopje, Vladimir Kavardarkov, 54, mempersiapkan panggung kecil dan mengangkat kursi di hadapan tenda yang disediakan oleh orang-orang yang akan menolak pemungutan pendapat.

src: "We are for NATO and EU, but we want to join with our heads up, not through the service door" Kavadarkov said.
mt: "Kita mendukung NATO dan EU, tetapi kita ingin bergabung dengan kepala kita, bukan melalui pintu layanan," kata Kavadarkov.

src: "We are a poor country, but we do have dignity.
mt: Kita adalah sebuah negara yang miskin, tetapi kita mempunyai kehormatan.

src: If they don't want to take us as Macedonia, we can turn to others like China and Russia and become part of Euro-Asia integration."
mt: Jika mereka tidak mahu menerima kami sebagai Macedon, kami boleh beralih ke negara-negara lain seperti China dan Rusia dan menjadi bahagian daripada integrasi Eropah-Amerika.

src: Prime Minister Zaev says NATO membership will bring much needed investment to Macedonia, which has an unemployment rate of more than 20 percent.
mt: Menteri Perdana Zaev mengatakan keanggotaan NATO akan mengekalkan investasi yang diperlukan kepada Makedonia, yang mempunyai kadar失业 lebih daripada 20 peratus.

src: "I believe the huge majority will be in favor because more than 80 percent of our citizens are in favor of EU and NATO," Zaev said after casting his ballot.
mt: "Kami percaya sebilang besar akan mendukung kerana lebih daripada 80 peratus rakyat kami mendukung EU dan NATO," kata Zaev selepas memilih.

src: He said that a "yes" result would be "confirmation of our future."
mt: Beliau mengatakan bahawa hasil "ya" akan menjadi "pengesahan tentang masa depan kami."

src: A poll published last Monday by Macedonia's Institute for Policy Research said between 30 and 43 percent of voters would take part in the referendum - below the required turnout.
mt: Kajian yang diterbitkan pada Isnin lalu oleh Institut Penelitian Kebijakan Macedonia menunjukkan antara 30 hingga 43 peratus pengundi akan menyertai referendum - di bawah kehadiran yang diperlukan.

src: Another poll, conducted by Macedonia's Telma TV, found 57 percent of respondents planning to vote on Sunday.
mt: Satu kajian lagi yang dijalankan oleh Telema TV dari Macedonia, menemui 57 peratus responden berplan untuk menyuai pada hari Ahad.

src: Of those, 70 percent said they would vote yes.
mt: Daripada mereka, 70 peratus menyatakan mereka akan berundi ya.

src: For the referendum to be successful turnout needs to be 50 percent plus one vote.
mt: Untuk pemilihan raya berjaya, jumlah undi perlu mencapai 50 peratus tambah satu undi.

src: A failure in the referendum would represent the first serious blow to policy of the pro-Western government since it took over in May last year.
mt: Kegagalan dalam pemilihan raya akan mewakili serangan pertama yang serius terhadap kebijakan pemerintah yang pro-Barat sejak mengambil alih kekuasaan pada Mei tahun lepas.

src: Watch: Manchester City's Sergio Aguero navigates through entire Brighton defense for goal
mt: Nonton: Sergio Aguero dari Manchester City melalui keseluruhan pertahanan Brighton untuk mencetak gol

src: Sergio Aguero and Raheem Sterling dispatched of the Brighton defense in Manchester City's 2-0 win on Saturday at Etihad Stadium in Manchester, England.
mt: Sergio Aguero dan Raheem Sterling menghancurkan pertahanan Brighton dalam kemenangan Manchester City 2-0 pada hari Sabtu di Stadion Etihad, Manchester, England.

src: Aguero made it look ridiculously easy on his score in the 65th minute.
mt: Aguero menunjukkan ia sangat mudah dalam pemainan pada minit ke-65.

src: The Argentine striker received a pass at midfield at the start of the sequence.
mt: Pemain Argentina menerima umpan di tengah lapangan pada mulanya.

src: He raced between three Brighton defenders, before slashing into the open field.
mt: Dia melompat antara tiga penjaga Brighton, sebelum menyerang ke padang terbuka.

src: Aguero then found himself surrounded by four green shirts.
mt: Aguero lalu terpinggir di sekeliling empat bendera hijau.

src: He pushed around one defender before outrunning several more at the edge of the Brighton box.
mt: Dia mendorong seorang penjaga sebelum melompat keluar dari seberang kotak Brighton.

src: He then pushed a pass to his left, finding Sterling.
mt: Beliau kemudian menyalurkan pujukan ke kiri, menemui Sterling.

src: The English forward used his first touch in the box to give the ball back to Aguero, who used his right boot to beat Brighton keeper Mathew Ryan with a shot into the right side of the net.
mt: Pemain bahasa Inggeris menggunakan sentuhan pertamanya di dalam kotak untuk mengembalikan bola kepada Aguero, yang menggunakan kaki kanan untuk menendang bola ke dalam kawasan kiri padang kepada penjaga Brighton Mathew Ryan.

src: "Aguero is struggling with some problems in his feet," City manager Pep Guardiola told reporters.
mt: "Aguero sedang menghadapi masalah pada kaki beliau," kata manager City, Pep Guardiola kepada pemberita.

src: "We spoke about him playing 55, 60 minutes.
mt: Kami telah membincangkan tentang dia memainkan 55, 60 minit.

src: That's what happened.
mt: Itulah yang berlaku.

src: We were lucky he scored a goal in that moment."
mt: Kami beruntung dia menyamai keputusan dalam masa itu.

src: But it was Sterling who gave the Sky Blues the initial advantage in the Premier League scuffle.
mt: Tetapi Sterling yang memberi kelebihan awal kepada Sky Blues dalam kacau belit Liga Utama.

src: That goal came in the 29th minute.
mt: Tujuan itu dicapai pada minit ke-29.

src: Aguero received the ball deep in Brighton territory on that play.
mt: Aguero menerima bola di dalam kawasan Brighton semasa permainan tersebut.

src: He sent a beautiful through ball along the left flank to Leroy Sane.
mt: Dia hancurkan bola melalui lengan kiri ke Leroy Sane.

src: Sane took a few touches before leading Sterling toward the far post.
mt: Sane mengambil beberapa pukulan sebelum memimpin Sterling ke post yang jauh.

src: The Sky Blues forward tapped the ball into the net just before sliding out of bounds.
mt: Pemain belakang Skyn Blues mengetik bola ke dalam gawang hanya sebelum melanggar garis batas.

src: City battles Hoffenheim in Champions League group play at 12:55 p.m. on Tuesday at Rhein-Neckar-Arena in Sinsheim, Germany.
mt: Pertandingan bandar melawan Hoffenheim dalam perlawanan kumpulan Liga Juara-Juara pada hari Selasa pukul 12:55 tengahari di Rhein-Neckar-Arena, Sinsheim, Jerman.

src: Scherzer wants to play spoiler vs. Rockies
mt: Scherzer mahu memainkan peranan mengganggu kekalahan terhadap Rockies

src: With the Nationals eliminated from playoff contention, there wasn't much reason to force another start.
mt: Dengan warga negara telah dikeluarkan daripada pertandingan untuk menentukan pemenang, tiada alasan yang banyak untuk memaksa penggunaan semula.

src: But the ever-competitive Scherzer hopes to take the mound on Sunday against the Colorado Rockies, but only if there are still playoff implications for the Rockies, who hold a one-game lead over the Los Angeles Dodgers in the NL West.
mt: Tetapi pemain yang selalu bersaing Scherzer mengharapkan untuk memasuki padang di hari Minggu melawan Colorado Rockies, tetapi hanya jika masih ada implikasi pertandingan playoff bagi Rockies, yang kini unggul satu pertandingan atas Los Angeles Dodgers di NL West.

src: The Rockies clinched at least a wild-card spot with a 5-2 win over the Nationals on Friday night, but are still looking to lock up their first division title.
mt: Rockies memperoleh tempat minimum dalam pusing wild-card dengan menang 5-2 melawan Nationals pada malam hari, tetapi masih mencari untuk memastikan juara divisi pertama mereka.

src: "Even though we're playing for nothing, at least we can be able to toe the rubber knowing that the atmosphere here in Denver with the crowd and the other team would be playing at probably the highest level of any point I would face this year.
mt: "Sekarang kami memainkan permainan tanpa ada yang menang, tetapi setidaknya kami dapat mengekalkan kestabilan dalam permainan mengenai suasana di Denver dengan kehadiran peminat dan pasukan lawan akan memainkan permainan pada tahap yang tertinggi mana pun saya mungkin mukul pada tahun ini."

src: Why wouldn't I want to compete in that?"
mt: Mengapa aku tidak mahu berlomba dalam situ?"

src: The Nationals have yet to announce a starter for Sunday, but are reportedly inclined to let Scherzer pitch in such a situation.
mt: Pemain nasional masih belum memaklumkan pemain utama untuk hari Sabtu, tetapi dilaporkan cenderung membiarkan Scherzer bercadang dalam situasi seperti ini.

src: Scherzer, who would be making his 34th start, threw a bullpen session on Thursday and would be pitching on his normal rest Sunday.
mt: Scherzer, yang akan membuatnya start ke-34, melempar sesi bullpen pada hari Rabu dan akan bercadang pada hari Sunday.

src: The Washington right-hander is 18-7 with a 2.53 ERA and 300 strikeouts in 220 2/3 innings this season.
mt: Pemain kanan Washington ini mempunyai rekod 18-7 dengan 2.53 ERA dan 300 strikeout dalam 220 2/3 inning musim ini.

src: Trump rallies in West Virginia
mt: Trump memancing di West Virginia

src: The President obliquely referred to the situation surrounding his Supreme Court pick Brett Kavanaugh while talking about the importance of Republican turnout in the midterm elections.
mt: Presiden secara tidak langsung menyebutkan situasi mengitarannya memilih Mahkamah Agung Brett Kavanaugh semasa membincangkan pentingnya kehadiran calon kawalannya dalam pilihan raya tengah tahun.

src: "All of what we've done is at stake in November.
mt: Semua yang telah kami lakukan itu terancam dalam November.

src: Five weeks away from one of the most important elections in our lifetimes.
mt: Lima minggu menjelang salah satu pilihan raya terpenting dalam seumur hidup kami.

src: This is one of the big, big -- I'm not running but I'm really running that's why I'm all over the place fighting for great candidates," he said.
mt: Ini ialah antara yang besar, besar – aku tidak berjalan tetapi aku benar-benar berjalan, itulah sebabnya aku di mana-mana memperjuangkan calon-calon terbaik," katanya.

src: Trump continued, "You see this horrible, horrible radical group of Democrats, you see it happening right now.
mt: Trump terus berkata, "Kamu lihat kelompok radikal demokrat yang mengerikan, mengerikan ini sedang terjadi pada masa kini.

src: And they're determined to take back power by using any means necessary, you see the meanness, the nastiness.
mt: Dan mereka berkesedaran untuk mengambil semula kekuatan dengan menggunakan mana-mana cara yang diperlukan, kamu lihat kebusukan, kebusukan itu.

src: They don't care who they hurt, who they have to run over in order to get power and control, that's what they want is power and control, we're not going to give it to them."
mt: Mereka tidak peduli siapa yang mereka luka, siapa yang mereka harus lalui untuk mendapatkan kekuasaan dan kontrol, itulah yang mereka inginkan, kekuasaan dan kontrol, kita tidak akan memberikannya kepada mereka."

src: Democrats, he said, are on a mission to "resist and obstruct."
mt: Beliau berkata, demokrat berada dalam misi "menentang dan menghalangi."

src: "And you see that over the last four days," he said, calling the Democrats "angry and mean and nasty and untruthful."
mt: "Dan kamu lihat itu dalam empat hari terakhir," katanya, memanggil demokrat sebagai 'marah, tidak baik, tidak baik, dan tidak benar.'

src: He referenced Senate Judiciary Committee ranking Democratic Sen. Dianne Feinstein by name, which received loud boos from the audience.
mt: Beliau menyebut nama Senator Demokrat Dianne Feinstein, ketua Komite Parlimen Perancak, yang memperoleh hujahan keras dari pengunjung.

src: "Remember her answer?
mt: Ingat jawapan dia?

src: Did you leak the document?
mt: Adakah kamu telah menyebarkan dokumen itu?

src: Uh, uh, what.
mt: Ah, ah, apa.

src: No, uh no, I wait one - that was really bad body language - the worst body language I've ever seen."
mt: Tidak, uh tidak, saya menunggu satu - itu adalah bahasa tubuh yang benar-benar buruk - bahasa tubuh terburuk yang pernah saya lihat.

src: Labour is no longer a broad church.
mt: Kerja tidak lagi merupakan satu organisasi yang luas.

src: It is intolerant of those who speak their minds
mt: Ia tidak toleran terhadap mereka yang berbicara dengan jujur.

src: When Momentum's activists in my local party voted to censure me, it was hardly a surprise.
mt: Apabila aktivis Momentum di parti saya memilih untuk mencekik saya, ia hampir tidak mengejutkan.

src: After all, I'm the latest in a line of Labour MPs to be told we are not welcome - all for speaking our minds.
mt: Selepas itu, saya ialah yang terkini dalam sebarisan Anggota Parlimen Labour yang diberi tahu bahawa kami tidak dihormati - semata-mata kerana menyampaikan pendapat kami.

src: My parliamentary colleague Joan Ryan received similar treatment because she resolutely stood up to antisemitism.
mt: Kakak berparlimen Joan Ryan mendapati perlakuan serupa kerana dia teguh menentang anti-Judaisme.

src: In my case, the censure motion criticised me for disagreeing with Jeremy Corbyn.
mt: Dalam kes saya, gerakan penyalah-pelbagai menuduh saya berdepan dengan Jeremy Corbyn.

src: On the importance of a responsible economic policy, on national security, on Europe, ironically similar issues on which Jeremy disagreed with previous leaders.
mt: Tentang pentingnya kebijakan ekonomi yang bertanggungjawab, tentang keselamatan nasional, tentang Eropah, secara tidak kesedaran diri, isu-isu yang serupa di mana Jeremy berpecah dengan pemimpin sebelumnya.

src: The notice for the Nottingham East Labour meeting on Friday stated that "we want the meetings to be inclusive and productive."
mt: Pemberitahuan mengenai majlis kerja kumpulan buruh Nottingham Timur pada hari Jumaat menyatakan bahawa "kami ingin majlis ini menyertakan semua pihak dan membuahkan hasil yang berfaedah."

src: For most of my eight years as the local Labour MP, the Friday night GC meetings have been exactly that.
mt: Sebagian besar tahun lima saya sebagai ahli parlimen Labour tempatan, majlis GC pada malam Jumaat telah menjadi tepat demikian.

src: Sadly today, it is not the tone of many meetings and the promise of "kinder, gentler" politics has long been forgotten if, indeed, it ever began.
mt: Sedikitnya, hari ini, nada banyak majlis tidak lagi memenuhi janji "politik yang lebih lembut dan ramah" yang sebenarnya mungkin pernah dimulakan.

src: It has become increasingly apparent that differing views are not tolerated in the Labour party and every opinion is judged on whether it is acceptable to the party leadership.
mt: Ia semakin jelas bahawa pandangan yang berbeza tidak diterima dalam parti Buruh dan setiap pendapat dijulang berdasarkan keupayaan ia diterima oleh pihak pemimpin parti.

src: This started shortly after Jeremy became leader, as colleagues with whom I had previously thought I shared a similar political outlook began expecting me to do a U-turn and take positions I would never have otherwise agreed with - whether on national security or the EU single market.
mt: Ini bermula tidak lama selepas Jeremy menjadi leader, kerana rakan-rakan yang sebelumnya saya thought saya mempunyai pandangan politik yang serupa mulai menunggu saya untuk melakukan pusingan 180 darjah dan mengambil kedudukan yang saya tidak akan setuju pada masa itu - sama ada dalam keselamatan nasional atau pasar unik EU.

src: Whenever I speak publicly - and it doesn't really matter what I say - there follows a tirade of abuse on social media calling for deselection, denouncing the politics of the centre, telling me I should not be in the Labour party.
mt: Sebarang saya berbicara di hadapan orang ramai - dan tidak penting apa yang saya katakan - akan mengikuti serangkaian kritikan yang memburukkan saya di media sosial, meminta saya dikeluarkan, menyerahkannya ke politik tengah, dan mengatakan bahawa saya tidak sepatutnya dalam parti Labour.

src: And that is not just my experience.
mt: Dan ini bukan hanya pengalaman saya sahaja.

src: Indeed, I know I am more fortunate than some of my colleagues as the comments directed at me tend to be political.
mt: Sebenarnya, saya mengetahui bahawa saya lebih beruntung daripada beberapa kawan kerja saya kerana komen yang ditujukan kepadaku cenderung politik.

src: I am in awe of the professionalism and determination of those colleagues who face a torrent of sexist or racist abuse every day but never shy away.
mt: Aku terpesona dengan profesionalisme dan ketekunan mereka yang setiap hari mukhlis dari serangan kesatuan atau rasial tetapi tidak mengecewakan.

src: One of the most disappointing aspects of this era of politics is how levels of abuse have become normalised.
mt: Satu daripada aspek paling menyesal dalam era politik ini ialah bagaimana tingkat kekerasan telah menjadi norma.

src: Jeremy Corbyn claimed last week that the Labour party should foster a culture of tolerance.
mt: Jeremy Corbyn menyangkalkan seminggu lalu bahawa parti Labour sepatutnya memupuk budaya toleransi.

src: The reality is we are no longer that broad church and with every "no-confidence" motion or change of selection rules the party becomes narrower.
mt: Ketidaksejahteraan sebenarnya ialah kita tidak lagi menjadi satu perpaduan yang luas, dan dengan setiap hala bahaya "tidak percaya" atau perubahan aturan pemilihan, parti menjadi lebih sempit.

src: I have had lots of advice over the past two years urging me to keep my head down, not to be so vocal and then I would "be all right."
mt: Saya telah menerima banyak nasihat selama dua tahun lalu yang menasihati saya untuk tetap diam, tidak terlalu terang-terang, dan kemudian saya akan "baik sahaja."

src: But that is not what I came into politics to do.
mt: Tapi itu bukan yang saya datangkan ke politik.

src: Ever since I joined Labour 32 years ago as a school pupil, provoked by the Thatcher government's neglect that had left my comprehensive school classroom literally falling down, I've sought to champion better public services for those who need them most - whether as a local councillor or government minister.
mt: Sejak memasuki Labour 32 tahun yang lalu sebagai pelajar sekolah, terangsang oleh ketidaktahuan kerajaan Thatcher yang telah menyebabkan ruang kelas sekolah saya yang komprehensif hampir runtuh, saya telah mencari menegakkan perkhidmatan awam yang lebih baik untuk mereka yang memerlukan ia paling teruk - sama ada sebagai anggota majlis kawasan atau pemangku kerajaan.

src: I have never hidden my politics, including at the last election.
mt: Saya tidak pernah menyembunyikan politik saya, termasuk pada pilihan raya terkini.

src: No one in Nottingham East could have been in any way confused about my policy positions and areas of disagreement with the current leadership.
mt: Tiada orang di Nottingham Timur yang boleh bimbang tentang pendirian kebijaksanaan saya dan kawasan yang berlainan pendapat dengan kepimpinan yang wujud sekarang.

src: To those who promoted the motion on Friday, all I would say is that when the country is ploughing towards a Brexit that will hurt households, businesses and our public services, I do not understand the desire to waste time and energy on my loyalty to the Labour party leader.
mt: Kepada mereka yang mempromosikan resolusi pada hari Jumaat, yang saya katakan ialah apabila negara sedang mengejar Brexit yang akan menyusahkan rumah tangga, perusahaan dan perkhidmatan awam, saya tidak memahami hasrat untuk menghabiskan masa dan tenaga untuk kesetiaan saya kepada pemimpin parti Labour.

src: But really the one message I have is not to Nottingham Momentum, it is to my constituents, whether Labour members or not: I am proud to serve you and I promise that no amount of deselection threats or political expediency will deter me from acting in what I believe are the best interests of you all.
mt: Tapi sebenarnya pesan satu-satunya yang saya ada ialah buat Nottingham Momentum, ianya buat para pengikut saya, sama ada ahli Labour atau bukan: saya bangga menjalankan tugas untuk anda dan saya janji bahawa tidak kira berapa banyak ancaman penghapusan atau kepentingan politik, saya tidak akan menyerah untuk bertindak demi kepentingan terbaik semua anda.

src: Chris Leslie is MP for Nottingham East
mt: Kristal Leslie ialah Ahli Parlimen Nottingham Timur.

src: Ayr 38 - 17 Melrose: Unbeaten Ayr go top
mt: Ayr 38 - 17 Melrose: Ayr memenangi pertama kali

src: Two late tries may have skewed the final result somewhat, but there is no doubt Ayr deserved to triumph in this wonderfully-entertaining Tennent's Premiership match of the day.
mt: Dua keputusan yang datang selepas masa mungkin menjejahatkan hasil akhir sedikit, tetapi tiada keraguan bahawa Ayr layak menang dalam perlawanan hari ini yang menarik dalam Liga Premiership Tennent.

src: They now top the table, the only unbeaten side of the ten.
mt: Kini mereka mendahului papan kemenangan, satu-satunya pasukan yang tidak pernah kalah dalam sepuluh pertandingan.

src: In the end, it was their superior defence, as much as their better chance-taking, which carried the home side and coach Peter Murchie had every right to be pleased.
mt: Akhirnya, keunggulan pertahanan mereka sekaligus peluang mengambil pilihan yang lebih baik, yang membawa kemenangan tim rumah dan pelatih Peter Murchie berhak untuk bersuka cita.

src: "We've been tested over our games this far, and we're still unbeaten, so I have to be happy," he said.
mt: "Kami telah ditesekan dalam permainan kita hingga kini, dan kami masih tak kalah, jadi saya harus bersyukur," katanya.

src: Robyn Christie of Melrose said: "Credit to Ayr, they took their chances better than we did."
mt: Robyn Christie dari Melrose berkata: "Kepada Ayr, mereka memanfaatkan peluang dengan lebih baik daripada kami."

src: Grant Anderson's 14th minute try, converted by Frazier Climo, put Ayr in front, but, a yellow card for Scotland cap Rory Hughes, released for the game by Warriors, allowed Melrose to make numbers tell and Jason Baggot grabbed an unconverted try.
mt: Cubaan Grant Anderson pada minit ke-14, yang disumbat oleh Frazier Climo, membolehkan Ayr mendahului, tetapi keputusan kertas kun untuk Rory Hughes, pemain Scotland yang dikeluarkan oleh Warriors, memungkinkan Melrose membuat jumlah pemainnya lebih unggul dan Jason Baggot memperoleh cubaan yang tidak disumbat.

src: Climo stretched the Ayr lead with a penalty, before, right on half-time, he scored then converted a solo try to make it 17-5 to Ayr at the break.
mt: Climo menambahkan keunggulan Ayr dengan penalti, lalu pada separuh waktu, dia mencetak satu touchdown sendirian untuk membuat skor 17-5 untuk Ayr pada waktu jeda.

src: But Melrose began the second half well and Patrick Anderson's try, converted by Baggot, reduced the leeway to five points.
mt: Tetapi Melrose bermula baik dalam separuh kedua, dan cubaan Patrick Anderson yang disumbat oleh Baggot mengurangkan perbezaan skor kepada lima poin.

src: There was then a lengthy hold-up for a serious injury to Ruaridh Knott, who was stretchered off, and from the restart, Ayr surged further ahead through a Stafford McDowall try, converted by Climo.
mt: Ada penundaan yang lama kerana cedera serius kepada Ruaridh Knott, yang dikeluarkan dengan tempat tidur, dan dari mula semula, Ayr mempercepat lagi melalui penerokaan oleh Stafford McDowall, yang disumbangkan oleh Climo.

src: Ayr acting captain Blair Macpherson was then yellow-carded, and again, Melrose made the extra man pay with an unconverted Bruce Colvine try, at the end of a spell of fierce pressure.
mt: Pemain tanding Ayr, Blair Macpherson, dikeluarkan dari padang, dan kali ini, Melrose membuat pihak lawan membayar dengan sebutah penerus yang tidak dikonversi, Bruce Colvine, di akhir satu babak tekanan yang sengit.

src: The home side came back, however, and when Struan Hutchinson was yellow-carded for tackling Climo without the ball, from the penalty line-out, MacPherson touched down at the back of the advancing Ayr maul.
