mt: Penyelidikan oleh Digital Awareness UK dan Konferensi Kepala Sekolah dan Kepala Sekolah Sekolah Swasta (HMC) menemui bahawa 40 peratuskan 11 hingga 18 tahun mempunyai dua profil, dengan separuh daripada mereka menyatakan bahawa mereka memelihara akaun peribadi.

src: HMC chief Mike Buchanan said: "It's disturbing so many teenagers are tempted into creating online spaces where parents and teachers cannot find them."
mt: Pengerusah HMC Mike Buchanan berkata: "Ia mengejutkan kerana banyak kanak-kanak tergoda untuk mencipta ruang online di mana ibu bapa dan guru tidak dapat menemui mereka."

src: Eilidh Doyle will be "voice for athletes" on Scottish Athletics board
mt: Eilidh Doyle akan menjadi "suara atlet" di pihak badan Scottish Athletics.

src: Eilidh Doyle has been elected to the board of Scottish Athletics as a non-executive director at the governing body's annual general meeting.
mt: Eilidh Doyle telah dipilih sebagai anggota tidak aktif dalam badan pengarah Scottish Athletics pada majlis umum tahunan badan pengarah.

src: Doyle is Scotland's most decorated track and field athlete and chairman Ian Beattie described the move as a great opportunity for those guiding the sport to benefit from her wide-ranging experience at international level over the past decade.
mt: Doyle ialah atlet lumba lantai yang paling berprestise di Skotlandia dan presiden Ian Beattie menghujah langkah ini sebagai peluang besar bagi pihak-pihak yang memimpin olahraga itu untuk menikmati pengalaman luasnya di level antarabangsa dalam sepuluh tahun terakhir.

src: "Eilidh has massive respect across the Scottish, UK and world athletics community and we are sure athletics in Scotland would benefit hugely by bringing her on to the board," Beattie said.
mt: "Eilidh mendapat penghargaan besar dalam komuniti atletik Skotland, UK dan dunia, dan kita yakin atletik Skotland akan menfaatkan banyak dari memasukkan dia ke dalam pihak pengarah," kata Beattie.

src: Doyle said: "I am keen to act as a voice for athletes and I am hoping I can really contribute and help guide the sport in Scotland."
mt: Doyle berkata: "Saya berminat untuk menjadi suara atlet dan saya berharap saya boleh benar-benar memberi sumbangan dan memainkan peranan memimpin sukan di Skotland. "

src: The American, who won the 200 metres and 400 metres at the 1996 Games in Atlanta among his total of four Olympic golds and is now a regular BBC pundit, was left unable to walk after suffering a transient ischemic attack.
mt: Pembalai yang menang dalam 200 meter dan 400 meter pada Olimpiad 1996 di Atlanta, yang memperoleh empat medali emas Olimpiade secara keseluruhan, dan kini menjadi pemeriksa BBC yang biasa, ditinggalkan tak bisa berjalan setelah mengalami serangan iskemik sementara.

src: He wrote on Twitter: "A month ago today I suffered a stroke.
mt: Dia tulis di Twitter: "Hari ini seminggu lepas saya mengalami serangan serebelum."

src: I could not walk.
mt: Aku tidak boleh berjalan.

src: Doctors said only time will tell if I will recover or to what degree.
mt: Ahli-ahli medis menyatakan hanya masa akan menentukan sama ada saya akan sembuh atau sejauh mana tingkat pemulihan saya.

src: Its been grueling work but made a full recovery, re-learned how to walk and today doing agility drills!
mt: Ia telah menjadi kerja yang menyahkita tetapi telah pulih sepenuhnya, belajar semula cara berjalan dan hari ini sedang melakukan latihan kecilkan!

src: Thanks for the messages of encouragement!"
mt: Terima kasih atas pesan-pesan yang memotivasi!

src: Breast pump advert comparing mothers to cows divides opinion online
mt: Panduan pemompa payudara membandingkan ibu dengan kambing memperkaya pendapat secara online

src: A breast pump company has divided opinion online with an advert that compares nursing mothers to cows being milked.
mt: Perusahaan pompa susu telah menyebabkan kontroversi di internet dengan iklan yang membandingkan ibu menyusui dengan sapi yang disusui.

src: To mark the launch of what is said to be the "world's first silent wearable breast bump," consumer tech company Elvie released a tongue-in-cheek music video-inspired advert to showcase the freedom the new pump gives to expressing mothers.
mt: Untuk menanda bermulannya pelancaran yang disebut sebagai "pembentuk payudara pertama di dunia yang suara mati," syarikat teknologi konsumer Elvie telah membuang iklan yang membuang makna dengan video iklan musik untuk menunjukkan kebebasan yang diberikan oleh pemompa baru kepada ibu-ibu yang ingin mengekspresikan diri mereka.

src: Four real mothers dance in a hay-filled barn of cows to a track that includes lyrics like: "Yes, I milk myself, but you don't see no tail" and "In case you hadn't noticed these are not udders, they're my boobs."
mt: Empat ibu sebenarnya menari di dalam rumah lembu yang penuh dengan rumput kepada lagu yang memuatkan ayat seperti: "Ya, saya menyusui diri sendiri, tetapi kamu tidak melihat ekor" dan "Dalam kes begitu, kamu mungkin belum pernah perhatikan, ini bukan payudara, ini payudara saya."

src: The chorus continues: "Pump it out, pump it out, I'm feeding them babies, pump it out, pump it out, I'm milking my ladies."
mt: Korpus terus menyanyikan: "Pomkan, pomkan, aku menyusukan mereka, pomkan, pomkan, aku menyusui ibu-ibu aku."

src: However, the advert, which has been published on the firm's Facebook page, has caused controversy online.
mt: Namun, iklan yang diterbitkan di laman Facebook syarikat ini telah menyebabkan kontroversi di internet.

src: With 77,000 views and hundreds of comments, the video has received mixed reactions from viewers, with many saying it makes light of the "horrors" of the dairy industry.
mt: Dengan 77,000 pemandangan dan beratus-beratus komen, video ini telah memperoleh respons yang bercampur dari penonton, dengan banyak orang menyatakan ia memperlekehkan "keganasan" dalam industri susu.

src: "Very poor decision using cows to advertise this product.
mt: Keputusan yang buruk untuk menggunakan kerbau untuk iklan produk ini.

src: Like us they need to get pregnant and give birth in order to produce milk, except their babies are stolen from them within days of giving birth," one wrote.
mt: "Seperti kami, mereka perlu hamil dan melahirkan anak untuk menghasilkan susu, kecuali bayi mereka direkahkan dalam beberapa hari setelah melahirkan," tulis seorang."

src: The Elvie breast pump fits discreetly inside a nursing bra (Elvie/Mother)
mt: Elvie penghisap susu sesuai dengan bra menyusui (Elvie/Mother)

src: Another commented: "Understandably traumatic for both mother and baby.
mt: Seorang lagi berkata: "Menyedari kejadian yang trauma kepada ibu dan bayi.

src: But yeah why not use them to advertise a breast pump for mothers who get to keep their babies?"
mt: Tapi, apa masalahnya nak guna mereka untuk iklankan pengisar payudara bagi ibu yang berjaya menyusukan anak mereka?

src: Someone else added: "Such an out of touch advert."
mt: Seorang lagi menambah: "Iklan yang tidak sejajar."

src: Others defended the advert, with one woman admitting that she found the song "hilarious."
mt: Mereka mempertahankan iklan tersebut, dengan seorang wanita mengakui bahawa ia menemui lagu tersebut "menyenangkan."

src: "I think this is a genus idea.
mt: Saya fikir konsep ini adalah genus.

src: I would've had one if I was still breastfeeding.
mt: Saya akan memilikinya jika masih sedang menyusui.

src: Pumping made me feel exactly like a cow.
mt: Menggoreng membuat saya merasa tepat seperti seekor lembu.

src: The advert is a little mad but I took it for what it was.
mt: Iklan itu sedikit gila tetapi aku ambil apa yang ia beri.

src: This is a genius product," one wrote.
mt: Ini adalah produk cemara," tulis seorang.

src: Another commented: "This is a fun advert aimed at mums who pump (often in their workplaces or toilets) and feel like "cows."
mt: Seorang lagi berkomentar: "Iklan ini menyenangkan yang ditargetkan kepada ibu-ibu yang menyusui (sering di tempat kerja atau tandatangan) dan merasa seperti 'kerbau.'"

src: This is not an advert praising or judging the dairy industry."
mt: Ini bukan iklan memuji atau menilai industri kelepa.

src: At the end of the video the group of women reveal they've all been dancing with the discreet pumps tucked in their bras.
mt: Akhirnya, pada akhir video, kumpulan wanita menunjukkan bahawa semua mereka telah menari dengan sepatu bot yang mesra diletakkan di dalam brasil mereka.

src: The concept behind the campaign is based on the insight that many women who breast-pump say they feel like cows.
mt: Konsep di belakang kampanye ini berdasarkan keinsiatan bahawa banyak wanita yang menyusui secara menyusui mengatakan mereka merasa seperti kambing.

src: The Elvie Pump however, is completely silent, has no wires or tubes and fits discreetly inside a nursing bra, giving women the freedom to move, hold their babies, and even go out while pumping.
mt: Elvie Pump pula, sepenuhnya suara, tidak mempunyai wayar atau saluran dan memasang secara mesra di dalam bra menyusui, memberi kebebasan kepada wanita untuk bergerak, memegang anak mereka, dan bahkan keluar sambil menyusui.

src: Ana Balarin, partner and ECD at Mother commented: "The Elvie Pump is such a revolutionary product that it deserved a bold and provocative launch.
mt: Ana Balarin, pasangan dan ECD di Mother berkata: "Elvie Pump adalah sebuah produk yang sangat revolusioner yang memperluhkan pelancaran yang berani dan menarik perhatian."

src: By drawing a parallel between expressing women and dairy cows we wanted to put breast pumping and all its challenges in the spotlight, while demonstrating in an entertaining and relatable way the incredible sense of freedom that the new pump will bring.
mt: Dengan mengambil contoh perbandingan antara mengekspresikan wanita dan sapi susu, kami ingin menarik perhatian pada menyusui susu badan dan semua tantangannya, sambil menunjukkan dalam cara yang menyenangkan dan mudah dipahami bagaimana bebasnya yang diberikan oleh pompa baru ini.

src: This is not the first time the Elvie pump has made the headlines.
mt: Ini bukan kali pertama Elvie pump memenuhi sinar media.

src: During London Fashion Week, a mother of two appeared on the catwalk for designer Marta Jakubowski while using the product.
mt: Masa London Fashion Week, seorang ibu dua anak muncul di atas catwalk untuk desainer Marta Jakubowski semasa menggunakan produk tersebut.

src: Hundreds of Migrant Children Quietly Moved to a Tent Camp on the Texas Border
mt: Ratusan Kanak-kanak Pemudahara Berpindah Kecantikan Ke Tahanan Tenda Di Batas Texas

src: The number of detained migrant children has spiked even though monthly border crossings have remained relatively unchanged, in part because harsh rhetoric and policies introduced by the Trump administration have made it harder to place children with sponsors.
mt: Bilangan kanak-kanak pendatang yang ditahan telah meningkat, walaupun jumlah penyeberangan sempadan bulanan tetap relatif sama, sebahagian daripada sebabnya adalah bahawa kenyataan dan polisi yang keras yang diperkenalkan oleh kerajaan Trump telah memudahkan memasangkan kanak-kanak dengan pengusahawan.

src: Traditionally, most sponsors have been undocumented immigrants themselves, and have feared jeopardizing their own ability to remain in the country by stepping forward to claim a child.
mt: Secara tradisional, kebanyakan penghibur telah menjadi pendatang tidak sah sendiri, dan telah takut menjamin kemampuan mereka untuk tetap di dalam negara dengan berani mengambil anak.

src: The risk increased in June, when federal authorities announced that potential sponsors and other adult members of their households would have to submit fingerprints, and that the data would be shared with immigration authorities.
mt: Risiko meningkat pada Jun, apabila pihak berkuasa federal mengumumkan bahawa penyponsor potential dan anggota dewasa lain dalam keluarga mereka perlu memasukkan tempat tanda ciri, dan data tersebut akan disebarkan kepada pihak imigrasi.

src: Last week, Matthew Albence, a senior official with Immigration and Customs Enforcement, testified before Congress that the agency had arrested dozens of people who applied to sponsor unaccompanied minors.
mt: Minggu lalu, Matthew Albence, pegawai senior dalam Agency Immigration and Customs Enforcement, menyatakan di Kongres bahawa agensi itu menahan puluhan orang yang mendaftar untuk menjadi penjaga kanak-kanak yang tidak berkompani.

src: The agency later confirmed that 70 percent of those arrested did not have prior criminal records.
mt: Pihak berwenang kemudian menepati bahawa 70 peratus daripada mereka yang ditahan tidak mempunyai rekod kriminal sebelum ini.

src: "Close to 80 percent of the individuals that are either sponsors or household members of sponsors are here in the country illegally, and a large chunk of those are criminal aliens.
mt: Kira-kira 80 peratus individu yang merupakan penaja atau ahli keluarga penaja berada di dalam negara secara非法, dan sebahagian besar daripada mereka ialah penduduk tidak sah.

src: So we are continuing to pursue those individuals," Mr. Albence said.
mt: "Kita terus mengejar mereka itu," kata Tuan Albence.

src: Seeking to process the children more quickly, officials introduced new rules that will require some of them to appear in court within a month of being detained, rather than after 60 days, which was the previous standard, according to shelter workers.
mt: Mencari cara memproses kanak-kanak dengan lebih cepat, pegawai memperkenalkan aturan baru yang menetapkan bahawa sebahagian daripada mereka perlu muncul di mahkamah dalam tempoh satu bulan selepas ditahan, bukan selepas 60 hari, yang merupakan standard sebelumnya, menurut pekerja tempat tinggal.

src: Many will appear via video conference call, rather than in person, to plead their case for legal status to an immigration judge.
mt: Banyak yang akan muncul melalui panggilan video konferensi, bukan secara langsung, untuk memperjuangkan status hukum mereka kepada pengadil imigrasi.

src: Those who are deemed ineligible for relief will be swiftly deported.
mt: Orang-orang yang dianggap tidak layak menerima pemulungan akan segera dikucilkan.

src: The longer that children remain in custody, the more likely they are to become anxious or depressed, which can lead to violent outbursts or escape attempts, according to shelter workers and reports that have emerged from the system in recent months.
mt: Semakin lama kanak-kanak tinggal dalam pihak berkuasa, semakin banyak kemungkinan mereka menjadi gugup atau depresi, yang boleh menyebabkan keadaan bengap atau usaha kabur, menurut pekerja tempat perlindungan dan laporan yang telah muncul dari sistem dalam beberapa bulan terakhir.

src: Advocates said those concerns are heightened at a larger facility like Tornillo, where signs that a child is struggling are more likely to be overlooked, because of its size.
mt: Pendukung menyatakan bahawa kekhawatiran ini meningkat di tempat perkhidmatan yang lebih besar seperti Tornillo, di mana tanda-tanda kanak-kanak sedang berjuang lebih mungkin diabaikan, kerana saiznya.

src: They added that moving children to the tent city without providing enough time to prepare them emotionally or to say goodbye to friends could compound trauma that many are already struggling with.
mt: Mereka menambahkan bahawa memindahkan kanak-kanak ke bandar rama-rama tanpa memberi masa yang cukup untuk mempersiapkan emosi mereka atau berkata goodbye kepada teman-teman boleh memperburuk trauma yang banyak orang sudah menghadapi.

src: Syria tells US, French and Turkish 'occupying forces' to withdraw immediately
mt: Syria meminta US, Perancis dan Turki untuk menarik pasukan penakluk segera

src: Addressing the UN General Assembly, Foreign Minister Walid al-Moualem also called on Syrian refugees to come home, even though the country's war is now in its eighth year.
mt: Menghadapi Perasmian Majlis Umum Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, Menteri Luar Walid al-Moualem juga memanggil penduduk Syria untuk kembali ke negaranya, meskipun perang negara itu kini memasuki tahun kedelapan.

src: Moualem, who also serves as deputy prime minister, said the foreign forces were on Syrian soil illegally, under the pretext of fighting terrorism, and "will be dealt with accordingly."
mt: Moualem, yang juga bertindak sebagai menteri antarabangsa, berkata pasukan luar akan berada di tanah Syeria secara tidak sah, dengan alasan memerangi terorisme, dan "akan ditangani secara sesuai."

src: "They must withdraw immediately and without any conditions," he told the assembly.
mt: "Mereka mesti menarik diri secara segera dan tanpa syarat," kata dia kepada majlis.

src: Moualem insisted that the "war on terror is almost over" in Syria, where more than 360,000 people have died since 2011, with millions more uprooted from their homes.
mt: Moualem menegaskan bahawa "perang melawan terorisme hampir berakhir" di Syeria, di mana lebih 360,000 orang telah meninggal sejak 2011, dengan jutaan lagi terpaksa tinggal di tempat asal mereka.

src: He said Damascus would continue "fighting this sacred battle until we purge all Syrian territories" of both terror groups and "any illegal foreign presence."
mt: Beliau berkata Damaskus akan terus "berperang dalam perang suci ini hingga kita membersihkan semua tanah Syria" daripada kedua-dua kumpulan teror dan "sebarang kehadiran asing yang tidak sah."

src: The United States has some 2,000 troops in Syria, mainly training and advising both Kurdish forces and Syrian Arabs opposed to President Bashar al-Assad.
mt: Antarabangsa Amerika mempunyai sekitar 2,000 askawan di Syeria, utamanya untuk memainkan peranan latihan dan memberi nasihat kepada pasukan Kurdi dan orang Arab Syeria yang menentang Presiden Bashar al-Assad.

src: France has more than 1,000 troops on the ground in the war-wracked country.
mt: France mempunyai lebih daripada 1,000 orang tentara di tempat di negara yang ditumbuhi perang.

src: On the issue of refugees, Moualem said the conditions were fine for them to return, and he blamed "some western countries" for "spreading irrational fears" that prompted refugees to stay away.
mt: Moualem berkata bahawa keadaan mereka adalah baik untuk kembali, dan dia menyalahkan "beberapa negara barat" kerana "menyebar ketakutan tidak masuk akal" yang menurutnya menyebabkan penduduk asli tinggal di tempat mereka.

src: "We have called upon the international community and humanitarian organizations to facilitate these returns," he said.
mt: "Kami telah memanggil komuniti antarabangsa dan organisasi khidmat manusia untuk memudahkan kembali mereka," kata beliau.

src: "They are politicizing what should be a purely humanitarian issue."
mt: "Mereka menyentuh isu yang seharusnya hanya isu humanitari."

src: The United States and the European Union have warned that there will be no reconstruction aid for Syria until there is a political agreement between Assad and the opposition to end the war.
mt: Antara Amerika Syarikat dan Union Eropah telah memperingatkan bahawa bantuan pemulihan tidak akan diberikan kepada Syira sehingga tercapai sepakat politik antara Assad dan pihak lawan untuk berakhir perang.

src: UN diplomats say a recent agreement between Russia and Turkey to set up a buffer zone in the last major rebel stronghold of Idlib has created an opportunity to press ahead with political talks.
mt: Ahli外交 dari UN berkata sepakat antara Russia dan Turkey untuk menetapkan zon pemutih di tempat terakhir penentang utama Idlib menciptakan peluang untuk melangkah lebih jauh dalam perbincangan politik.

src: The Russian-Turkish deal averted a large-scale assault by Russian-backed Syrian forces on the province, where three million people live.
mt: Kerjasama Rusia dan Turki menahan serangan skala besar oleh pasukan Syeikh yang didukung Rusia di wilayah tersebut, di mana tinggal tiga juta orang.

src: Moualem however stressed that the agreement had "clear deadlines" and expressed hope that military action will target jihadists including fighters from the Al-Qaeda-linked Nusra Front, who "will be eradicated."
mt: Namun Moualem menekankan bahawa perjanjian tersebut mempunyai "batas masa yang jelas" dan mengekalkan harapan bahawa tindakan militer akan menargetkan pihak-pihak yang berkhidmat kepada teroris, termasuk pemain perang dari Front Nusra yang berkaitan dengan Al-Qaeda, yang "akan dihapuskan."

src: UN envoy Staffan de Mistura is hoping to soon convene the first meetings of a new committee comprised of government and opposition members to draft a post-war constitution for Syria and pave the way to elections.
mt: Pengerusi misi UN, Staffan de Mistura, berharap untuk segera memanggil pertemuan pertama sebuah komitet baru yang terdiri daripada ahli pentadbiran dan pihak lawan untuk menyusun konstitusi selepas perang untuk Syeikh dan meneruskan jalan menuju pemilihan umum.

src: Moualem laid out conditions for the Syrian government's participation in the committee, saying the panel's work should be restricted "to reviewing the articles of the current constitution," and warned against interference.
mt: Moualem menetapkan syarat bagi peserta syarikat kerajaan Syerak, menyarankan bahawa kerja panel sepatutnya terbatas "mengkaji artikel-akta konstitusi yang semasa," dan memberi peringatan mengenai intervensi.

src: Why Trump Will Win a Second Term
mt: Mengapa Trump Bakal Menang Dalam Tempoh Kedua

src: By that logic, Mr. Trump would win re-election in 2020 unless, as many liberal viewers are probably hoping, impeachment and scandal end his presidency prematurely.
mt: Menurut logik itu, Tn. Trump akan menang dalam pilihan raya ulang tahun 2020 kecuali, seperti yang mungkin berharap ramai penonton kental, pengundian dan skandal menghentikan masa pangkuan beliau secara awal.

src: In what would no doubt be "The most dramatic finale of a presidency ever!"
mt: yang pasti "akhir presiden yang paling dramatik!"

src: As of now, there are no signs of viewer fatigue.
mt: Sehingga masa kini, tiada tanda kelelahan penonton.

src: Since 2014, prime-time ratings have more than doubled to 1.05 million at CNN and nearly tripled to 1.6 million at MSNBC.
mt: Sejak 2014, jumlah penonton pada masa malam telah meningkat lebih daripada dua kali ke 1.05 juta di CNN dan hampir tiga kali ke 1.6 juta di MSNBC.

src: Fox News has an average of 2.4 million prime-time viewers, up from 1.7 million four years ago, according to Nielsen, and MSNBC's "The Rachel Maddow Show" has topped cable ratings with as many as 3.5 million viewers on major news nights.
mt: Menurut Nielsen, Fox News mempunyai purata 2.4 juta penonton masa prime time, meningkat daripada 1.7 juta empat tahun yang lalu, dan "The Rachel Maddow Show" dari MSNBC telah menjangkau rekod tontonan saluran berpembawa berpembawa dengan sebanyak 3.5 juta penonton pada malam-malam berita utama.

src: "This is a fire that people are being drawn to because it's not something we understand," said Neal Baer, show runner of the ABC drama "Designated Survivor," about a cabinet secretary who becomes president after an attack destroys the Capitol.
mt: "Mengenai seorang sekretaris kabinet yang menjadi presiden selepas serangan menghancurkan Capitol, ini ialah api yang orang-orang ditarik ke sana kerana ia bukan sesuatu yang kita fahami," kata Neal Baer, pengarah acara drama ABC "Designated Survivor".

src: Nell Scovell, a veteran comedy writer and author of "Just the Funny Parts: And a Few Hard Truths About Sneaking Into the Hollywood Boys" Club," has another theory.
mt: Nell Scovell, seorang penulis komedi senior dan penulis buku "Just the Funny Parts: And a Few Hard Truths About Sneaking Into the Hollywood Boys' Club", mempunya teori lain.

src: She remembers a cab ride in Boston before the 2016 election.
mt: Dia ingat perjalanan dalam taxi di Boston sebelum pemilihan 2016.

src: The driver told her he would be voting for Mr. Trump.
mt: Pemandi mengatakan dia akan memilih Presiden Trump.

src: Why? she asked.
mt: Mengapakah itu? tanya dia.

src: "He said, "Because he makes me laugh,"" Ms. Scovell told me.
mt: "Mengatakan, 'Karena dia membuat saya tertawa,' " kata Miss Scovell kepada saya.

src: There is entertainment value in the chaos.
mt: Ada nilai ke娱离 dalam kekacauan.

src: Of course, unlike anything else on TV, the story lines coming out of Washington could determine the future of Roe v. Wade, whether immigrant families can reunite and the health of the global economy.
mt: Tentu saja, berbeza dengan apa-apa yang lain di televisyen, penerangan mengenai isu-isu yang muncul daripada Washington boleh menentukan masa depan kes Roe v. Wade, kemampuan keluarga pendatang untuk menyatukan keluarga, dan kesejahteraan ekonomi global.

src: Tuning out is a luxury only the most privileged viewers can afford.
mt: Mengalihkan perhatian adalah keistimewaan yang hanya dapat didapat oleh penonton yang paling berkecukupan.

src: And yet, it goes beyond being an informed citizen when you find yourself on hour six of watching a panel of experts debate Bob Woodward's use of "deep background" sourcing for his book "Fear," Paul Manafort's $15,000 ostrich-leather bomber jacket ("a garment thick with hubris," The Washington Post said) and the implications of Stormy Daniels's lurid descriptions of Mr. Trump's, um, anatomy.
mt: Namun, ia melampaui menjadi seorang warga yang ber-informasi apabila anda berada pada jam keenam dalam menonton panel ahli membahas penggunaan "deep background" oleh Bob Woodward dalam bukunya "Fear," penggunaan $15,000 jersi kulit unta oleh Paul Manafort ("sebuah pakaian yang penuh dengan kebanggaan," kata The Washington Post) dan implikasi dari deskripsi yang menarik perhatian Stormy Daniels mengenai anatomi Presiden Trump, um, anatomi.

src: I, for one, will never look at Super Mario the same way again.
mt: Saya, daripada yang lain, tidak akan memandang Super Mario dengan cara yang sama lagi.

src: "Part of what he's doing that makes it feel like a reality show is that he is feeding you something every night," said Brent Montgomery, chief executive of Wheelhouse Entertainment and the creator of "Pawn Stars," about the Trump show's rotating cast and daily plot twists (picking a fight with the N.F.L., praising Kim Jong-un).
mt: "Sebahagian daripada yang dia buat yang menyebabkan ia terasa seperti sebuah pertunjukan nyata ialah dia memberi makan kamu sesuatu setiap hari," kata Brent Montgomery, pengarah utama Wheelhouse Entertainment dan pencipta "Pawn Stars," mengenai pertunjukan Trump yang mempunyai pemain bergilir dan twist plot harian (menyara pertikaian dengan N.F.L., menghormati Kim Jong-un).

src: You can't afford to miss one episode or you're left behind.
mt: Anda tidak boleh tersinggung dalam satu episod atau anda akan tertinggal.

src: When I reached Mr. Fleiss this week, it was a sunny 80 degrees outside his home on the north shore of Kauai, but he was holed up inside watching MSNBC while recording CNN.
mt: Saya sampai ke rumah Mr. Fleiss minggu ini, cuaca di luar rumahnya di pantai utara Kauai yang cerah sejuk 80 derajat, tetapi dia berada di dalam rumah menonton MSNBC sementara memasarkan CNN.

src: He couldn't peel himself away, not with Brett Kavanaugh set to face the Senate Judiciary Committee and the future of the Supreme Court hanging in the balance.
mt: Dia tidak mampu melepaskan diri darinya, tidak pun dengan Brett Kavanaugh yang akan menghadapi Committee Senate Judiciary dan masa depan Mahkamah Agung tergantung di tiang.

src: "I remember when we were doing all those crazy shows back in the day and people said, "This is the beginning of the end of Western civilization,"" Mr. Fleiss told me.
mt: "Masih terasa masa muda saya semasa menjalani semua tampilan kacak semasa itu dan orang-orang berkata, "Ini mula permulaan akhir peradaban Barat,"" kata Tuan Fleiss kepada saya.

src: "I thought it was sort of a joke, but it turns out they were right."
mt: Saya rasa ia hanyalah cakap cakap, tetapi ternyata mereka betul.

src: Amy Chozick, a writer at large for The Times covering business, politics and media, is the author of the memoir "Chasing Hillary."
mt: Pengarang Amy Chozick, yang menulis untuk The Times mengenai perusahaan, politik dan media, ialah penulis buku memoir "Chasing Hillary."

src: Outside money floods into tightest midterm election House races
mt: Dana luar memasuki pemilihan tengah terkunci rumah

src: It's not surprising that Pennsylvania's 17th is seeing a flood of cash, thanks to a realignment of a congressional districts that landed two incumbents in a race for the same seat.
mt: Tidak mengejutkan bahawa kawasan ke-17 Pennsylvania mengalami aliran dana yang melimpah, berkat pengesahan semula kawasan parlimen yang menempatkan dua calon yang semasa dalam pertandingan untuk mengejar tempat yang sama.

src: This recently redrawn suburban Pittsburg district pits Democrat Rep. Conor Lamb - who won his seat in another district in a special election last spring.
mt: Pertarungan kawasan suburbian Pittsburg yang dikemas semula ini melibatkan Ahli Parlimen Demokrat Conor Lamb - yang menang dalam pemilihan khas musim semi lalu untuk kerusi di kawasan lain.

src: Lamb is running against another incumbent, Republican Keith Rothfus, who currently represents the old Pennsylvania 12th district, which overlaps heavily with the new 17th.
mt: Lamb berlawanan dengan calon incumbent, Keith Rothfus dari Republik, yang kini mewakili kawasan keadilan Pennsylvania ke-12 yang berimpit secara berat dengan kawasan keadilan ke-17 yang baru.

src: The maps were redrawn after the Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled in January that the old districts were unconstitutionally gerrymandered in Republicans' favor.
mt: Peta-peta direkaji semula selepas Mahkamah Pengarah Pennsylvania memutuskan pada Januari bahawa kekalunan lama tidak konstitusional dalam kepentingan Republikan.

src: The race in the new 17th has touched off a campaign finance slugfest between the major party finance arms, the Democratic Campaign Congressional Committee (DCCC) and the National Republican Campaign Committee (NRCC).
mt: Perbaladakan dalam perlombaan baharu yang ke 17 telah memicu kampanye mengenai pengeluaran dana politik antara dua buah organisasi pembangkangan utama, Komite Kebangkangan Demokrat (DCCC) dan Komite Kebangkangan Republik (NRCC).

src: Lamb became a familiar name in Pennsylvania after a narrow win in a widely watched in March special election for Pennsylvania's 18th Congressional District.
mt: Lamb menjadi nama yang familiar di Pennsylvania setelah menang dengan margins kecil dalam pemilihan khas pada Mac 2022 bagi district kongres ke-18 Pennsylvania.

src: That seat had been held by a Republican for over a decade, and President Donald Trump won the district by 20 points.
mt: Kemudiannya, tempat duduk itu telah dipegang oleh seorang Republikan selama lebih dari sedecade, dan Presiden Donald Trump memenangi kawasan itu dengan selisih 20 poin.

src: Political pundits have given Democrats a slight edge.
mt: Ahli politik telah memberi keunggulan ke parti Demokrat.

src: U.S. Weighed Penalizing El Salvador Over Support for China, Then Backed Off
mt: ASATUAAN USA MENGEWAJAR KEMBALI MELAWAN SALVADOR, LALU MENGGUNAKAN KEMBALI KE PENGHAKIMAN

src: Diplomats noted that the Dominican Republic and Panama had already recognized Beijing, with little pushback from Washington.
mt: Ahli外交 menarik perhatian bahawa Republik Dominikannya dan Panama telah mengakui Beijing dengan sedikit perlawanan dari Washington.

src: Mr. Trump had a warm meeting with President Juan Carlos Varela of Panama in June 2017 and had a hotel in Panama until partners evicted the Trump Organization's management team.
mt: Ahli politik Trump mempunyai sidang yang mesra dengan Presiden Juan Carlos Varela dari Panama pada Jun 2017 dan mempunyai bilik hotel di Panama hingga pasangan mengeluarkan tim pengurusan Trump Organization.

src: State Department officials decided to call back the American chiefs of diplomatic missions from El Salvador, the Dominican Republic and Panama over the "recent decisions to no longer recognize Taiwan," Heather Nauert, the department's spokeswoman, said in a statement early this month.
mt: Pihak pentadbiran negara memutuskan untuk memanggil kembali pegawai Amerika yang memimpin misi diplomatik di El Salvador, Republik Dominicana dan Panama mengikut "keputusan terkini untuk tidak lagi mengakui Taiwan," kata pengarah pihak pentadbiran, Heather Nauert, dalam satu pernyataan awal bulan ini.

src: But penalties were only considered against El Salvador, which received an estimated $140 million in American aid in 2017, including for narcotics controls, development and economic support.
mt: Tapi hukuman hanya dianggap terhadap El Salvador, yang menerima sebanyak $140 juta bantuan Amerika pada 2017, termasuk untuk pengawasan narkoba, pengembangan dan sokongan ekonomi.

src: The proposed penalties, which included cuts to financial aid and targeted visa restrictions, would have been painful for the Central American country and its high unemployment and murder rates.
mt: Penalti yang ditawarkan termasuk pengurangan bantuan keuangan dan keterbatasan visa yang ditujukan, akan menyebabkan kesakitan kepada negara Tenggara Eropah dan tingginya kadar kemiskinan dan jumlah korupsi.

src: As internal meetings progressed, North American and Central American officials postponed a high-level conference focused on security and economic prosperity to follow up a similar gathering last year that was seen as a step forward in efforts to prevent migrants from heading to the United States.
mt: Sebagai proses pertemuan dalam negeri berlangsung, pegawai dari Amerika Utara dan Amerika Tengah menunda konferensi tinggi berfokus pada keamanan dan kemakmuran ekonomi untuk mengikuti sidang serupa tahun lalu yang dianggap sebagai langkah maju dalam upaya mencegah pengembara mencapai Amerika Syarikat.

src: But by mid-September, top administration officials made clear that they wanted the conference to go forward, effectively ending any consideration of penalties for El Salvador.
mt: Tetapi pada pertengahan September, pegawai penting dalam pihak pentadbiran telah jelas menyatakan bahawa mereka ingin konferensi itu berlangsung, secara efektif menamatkan sebarang pertimbangan mengenai denda terhadap El Salvador.

src: Vice President Mike Pence is now slated to address the conference, now scheduled for mid-October, in a signal of the import the administration places on the gathering, the diplomats said.
mt: Pemimpin Pertama Mike Pence kini dijadwalkan memberi pembukaan kepada konferensi, yang kini dijadwalkan berlangsung pada pertengahan Oktober, sebagai tanda pentingnya konferensi tersebut dalam pandangan pemerintahan.

src: And the three American envoys quietly returned to El Salvador, Panama and the Dominican Republic with no new tough messages or punishments from Washington.
mt: Dan tiga utusan Amerika diam-diam kembali ke El Salvador, Panama dan Republik Dominikana tanpa pesan atau hukuman yang keras dari Washington.

src: A White House spokesman for Mr. Bolton declined to comment on the details of the debate that were described by the three American officials, including two diplomats, who agreed to discuss the internal deliberations on the condition of anonymity.
mt: Pemangku rumah istana putih untuk Encik Bolton menolak berkomentar mengenai butiran debat yang dihuraikan oleh tiga pegawai perahan Amerika, termasuk dua pegawai perahan, yang bersetuju untuk membincangkan pernyataan dalam keadaan anonyim.

src: Their accounts were corroborated by an outside analyst who is close to the administration and also spoke on the condition of anonymity.
mt: Akta mereka disokong oleh seorang analis luar yang dekat dengan pihak pentadbiran dan juga memberi komen dalam keadaan anonyim.

src: Study History
mt: Sejarah

src: The next shoe to drop could be the special counsel Robert Mueller's report on Mr. Trump's possible obstruction of justice, of which there now is very substantial evidence in the public record.
mt: Kemungkinan besar, laporan pegawai khusus Robert Mueller akan mengejutkan orang-orang bahwa ada bukti yang cukup signifikan dalam catatan umum mengenai kemungkinan penggangguan keadilan oleh Tuan Trump.

src: Mr. Mueller is reportedly also turning his investigation to whether Mr. Trump's campaign colluded with Russia in its attack on our elections.
mt: Kenyataan dilaporkan bahawa Tuan Mueller juga sedang meneliti sama ada pindaan Tuan Trump bersama dengan Russia dalam serangan terhadap pemilihan kami.

src: Should Congress change hands, Mr. Trump will find himself facing accountability in that body, just as he prepares to go again before the voters, and perhaps eventually a jury of his peers.
mt: Jika Kongres berubah tangan, Tuan Trump akan menemui pertanggungjawaban dalam badan tersebut, sama seperti dia mempersiapkan diri untuk berdebat kembali di hadapan pemilih, dan mungkin akhirnya di hadapan pengadil sejawatnya.

src: That is a lot of ifs, and I do not mean to suggest that Mr. Trump's fall is inevitable - nor that of his equivalents in Europe.
mt: Itu ialah banyak syarat, dan saya tidak bermaksud menunjukkan bahawa kemunduran Encik Trump adalah mustahil - bahkan kemunduran mereka yang setara dengannya di Eropah.

src: There are choices to be made by all of us on both sides of the Atlantic that will affect how prolonged the struggle may be.
mt: Ada pilihan yang perlu dibuat oleh semua antara kedua belah bahagian Atlantik yang akan mempengaruhi sejauh mana perjuangan akan berlaru.

src: In 1938, German officers were ready to stage a coup d"état against Hitler, if only the West had resisted him and backed the Czechoslovaks at Munich.
mt: Pada 1938, pegawai perang Jerman siap mengadakan pemberontakan menghadapi Hitler, jika hanya jika Barat menentangnya dan menyokong Kecahatan Czechoslovakia di Munich.

src: We failed, and missed an opportunity to avoid the years of carnage that ensued.
mt: Kita telah gagal, dan melepas peluang untuk menghindari tahun-tahun pembunuhan yang terjadi kemudian.

src: The course of history pivots around such inflection points, and democracy's inexorable march is accelerated or delayed.
mt: Pengembaraan sejarah memutar di sekitar titik-titik perubahan semacam ini, dan kemajuan demokrasi yang tak terhindarkan dipercepat atau ditunda.

src: Americans face several of these inflection points now.
mt: Ahli-ahli Amerika menghadapi beberapa titik penting ini kini.

src: What will we do if Mr. Trump fires Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein, the man who controls the fate of Mr. Mueller's investigation?
mt: Apakah yang akan kita buat jika Presiden Trump mengeluarkan bekas Wakil Menteri Hukum Rod Rosenstein, orang yang mempunyai kekuatan mengendalikan masa depan penyelidikan Mr. Mueller?

src: Rosenstein has been in hot water ever since this paper reported that, last year, he suggested secretly recording the president and speculated about his being unfit for office.
mt: Rosenstein telah terlibat dalam masalah sejak kertas ini melaporkan bahawa, tahun lepas, dia menyarankan secara rahsia merekodkan presiden dan menerka tentang ketidakuptayaan beliau dalam jabatan.

src: Mr. Rosenstein says The Times's account is inaccurate.
mt: Tuan Rosenstein berkata laporan The Times tidak akurat.

src: "How will we respond if the newly requested F.B.I. investigation of Brett Kavanaugh is not full or fair - or if he is confirmed to the Supreme Court despite credible accusations of sexual assault and dishonest testimony?
mt: Bagaimana kita akan merespons jika penyelidikan FBI yang baru diperiksa terhadap Brett Kavanaugh tidak lengkap atau adil - atau jika dia dikonfirmasi ke Mahkamah Agung meskipun ada dakwaan yang memperkaya tentang kekerasan seksual dan saksi tidak jujur?

src: And above all, will we vote in the midterms for a Congress that will hold Mr. Trump accountable?
mt: Dan terutama, akan kita vote dalam pemilihan tengah untuk sebuah Kongres yang akan menahan Mr. Trump?

src: If we fail those tests, democracy will be in for a long winter.
mt: Jika kita gagal dalam ujian tersebut, demokrasi akan menghadapi musim dingin yang lama.

src: But I believe we will not fail, because of the lesson I learned in Prague.
mt: Tapi saya percaya kami tidak akan gagal, kerana pelajaran yang saya pelajari di Praha.

src: My mother was a Czechoslovak Jew who was deported to Auschwitz by the same Nazi regime that once occupied my ambassadorial home.
mt: Ibu saya adalah penduduk Yahudi Republik Cekoslowakia yang diusir ke Auschwitz oleh pemerintah Nazi yang sama yang pernah menghuni rumah saya sebagai perwakilan diplomatik.

src: She survived, immigrated to America and, 60 years later, sent me off to light Sabbath candles on that table bearing the swastika.
mt: Dia selamat, mengemigrasi ke Amerika, dan 60 tahun kemudian, mengirimkan saya ke meja itu untuk menyalakan cahaya Sabat, yang terpajang bendera bintang dan seru.

src: With that as my heritage, how can I not be an optimist about our future?"
mt: Dengan kekayaan itu, bagaimana saya tidak optimis mengenai masa depan kami?

src: Norman Eisen, a senior fellow at the Brookings Institution, is the chairman of Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington and the author of "The Last Palace: Europe's Turbulent Century in Five Lives and One Legendary House."
mt: Norman Eisen, seorang penasihat senior di Institut Brookings, merupakan presiden Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington dan penulis buku "The Last Palace: Europe's Turbulent Century in Five Lives and One Legendary House."

src: Rangers' Graham Dorrans optimistic ahead of Rapid Vienna clash
mt: Rangers' Graham Dorrans optimistik sebelum bertemu Rapid Vienna

src: Rangers host Rapid Vienna on Thursday, knowing that victory over the Austrians, following the impressive draw in Spain against Villarreal earlier this month, will put them in a strong position to qualify from Group G of the Europa League.
mt: Rangers menghadapi Rapid Vienna pada hari Jumat, tahu bahawa kemenangan melawan pihak Austria, mengikuti keputusan seri yang menarik melawan Villarreal di Spanyol pada bulan ini, akan menempatkan mereka dalam posisi kuat untuk memenuhi syarat kelompok G Liga Europa.

src: A knee injury prevented midfielder Graham Dorrans from making his first appearance of the season until the 2-2 draw with Villarreal but he believes Rangers can use that result as a springboard to greater things.
mt: Cedera lutut mencegah pemain tengah Graham Dorrans untuk tampil dalam pertandingan pertama musimnya hingga imbang 2-2 melawan Villarreal, namun dia percaya Rangers dapat menggunakan hasil tersebut sebagai awal untuk pencapaian yang lebih besar.

src: "It was a good point for us because Villarreal are a good side," said the 31-year-old.
mt: "Ini adalah titik baik untuk kami kerana Villarreal ialah tim yang baik," kata lelaki berusia 31 tahun.

src: "We went into the game believing we could get something and came away with a point.
mt: Kita memasuki permainan dengan percaya kita dapat mendapatkan sesuatu dan pulang dengan satu poin.

src: Maybe we could have nicked it in the end but, overall, a draw was probably a fair result.
mt: Mungkin kita boleh menang akhirnya, tetapi secara keseluruhan, skor seri mungkin adalah hasil yang adil.

src: They were probably better in the first half and we came out in the second half and were the better side.
mt: Mereka mungkin lebih baik pada separuh pertama dan kami keluar pada separuh kedua dan menjadi pihak yang lebih baik.

src: Going into Thursday, it's another big European night.
mt: Menyusul hari Khamis, ia adalah malam besar Eropah lagi.

src: Hopefully, we can get three points but that will be tough game because they had a good result in their last game but, with the crowd behind us, I'm sure we can push on and get a positive result.
mt: Semoga kita dapat menang dengan tiga poin, tetapi permainan ini akan berat kerana mereka memperoleh keputusan yang baik dalam permainan terakhir mereka, tetapi dengan pendukung di sisi kita, pasti kita boleh berjaya dan mendapatkan keputusan yang positif.

src: Last year was definitely tough, between everything that happened with my injuries and the changes at the club itself but there's a feelgood factor about the place now.
mt: Tahun lepas pasti sukar, antara semua yang berlaku terhadap cedera saya dan perubahan di dalam pihak kelab itu, tetapi kini ada faktor baik hati di sini.

src: The squad's good and the boys are really enjoying it; the training's good.
mt: Tim NBA yang baik dan pemain-pemain benar-benar menikmati pelatihan itu.

src: Hopefully, we can push on now, put last season behind us and be successful."
mt: Harapannya, kita boleh terus melangkah maju, melepas musim lalu di belakang dan berjaya.

src: Women are losing sleep over this retirement savings fear
mt: Perempuan kehilangan tidur kerana fobia menyimpan wang pensiun

src: Despite the fact that survey participants had a clear idea of how they wanted to be cared for, few people were talking to their family members about it.
mt: Meskipun peserta kira-kira mempunyai idea yang jelas tentang bagaimana mereka mahu dijaga, sedikit orang berborak dengan ahli keluarga mengenai hal tersebut.

src: About half of the individuals in the Nationwide study said they were speaking with their spouses about the cost of long-term care.
mt: Kira-kira separuh individu dalam kajian nasional berkata mereka sedang bercakap tentang kos perkhidmahan jangka panjang dengan suami mereka.

src: Only 10 percent said they spoke with their kids about it.
mt: Hanya 10 peratus berkata mereka berbual dengan anak-anak tentang topik ini.

src: "People want a family member to care for them, but they aren't taking the steps to have the conversation," said Holly Snyder, vice president of Nationwide's life insurance business.
mt: "Orang-orang mahu mempunyai keluarga yang memenuhi tanggungjawab kepadanya, tetapi mereka tidak mengambil langkah untuk berbicara tentang hal tersebut," kata Holly Snyder, pengarah perusahaan hayat Nationwide.

src: Here's where to begin.
mt: Ini tempat untuk mulakan.

src: Talk to your spouse and the kids: You can't prepare your family to provide care if you don't make your wishes known well ahead of time.
mt: Bercakap dengan suami dan anak-anakmu: Anda tidak dapat menyiapkan keluarga untuk memberikan perawatan jika tidak menyampaikan keinginanmu dengan jelas sejak awal.

src: Work with your advisor and your family to discuss where and how to receive care, as those choices can be a significant factor in determining the cost.
mt: Bekerja sama dengan penasihatan dan keluarga untuk membincangkan tempat dan cara mendapatkan rawatan, kerana pilihan-pilihan tersebut boleh menjadi faktor utama dalam menentukan kosnya.

src: Bring in your financial advisor: Your advisor can also help you come up with a way to pay for those expenses.
mt: Hantarkan kaunsel berbasikal anda: Kaunsel berbasikal anda boleh membantu anda mencari cara untuk membayar kos-kos tersebut.

src: Your funding choices for long-term care can include a traditional long-term care insurance policy, a hybrid cash-value life insurance policy to help cover these expenses or self-insuring with your own wealth - as long as you have the money.
mt: Pilihan pendanaan untuk perkhidmatan pemeliharaan jangka panjang boleh termasuk polis asuransi pemeliharaan jangka panjang tradisional, polis asuransi hayat nilai wang tunai campuran untuk membantu menutupi kos ini, atau mempertanggungjawabkan secara sendiri dengan kekayaan anda - selia anda mempunai dana.

src: Hammer out your legal documents: Head off legal battles at the pass.
mt: Ketukkan dokumen hukummu: Hentikan perangkaian hukum sebelum ia dimulakan.

src: Get a health-care proxy in place so that you designate a trusted individual to oversee your medical care and ensure that professionals comply with your wishes in case you're unable to communicate.
mt: Kemukakan wakil perkhidmatan kesihatan untuk memastikan individu yang dipercayai ditetapkan untuk memantau perkhidmatan kesihatan anda dan memastikan profesional mematuhi keinginan anda jika tidak mampu berkomunikasi.

src: Also, consider a power of attorney for your finances.
mt: Kemudian, pertimbangkan surat kuasa untuk keuangan Anda.

src: You would select a trusted person to make financial decisions for you and ensure your bills get paid if you're incapacitated.
mt: Anda akan memilih orang yang dapat dipercayai untuk membuat keputusan finansial untuk anda dan memastikan cek anda dibayar jika anda tidak mampu berbuat apa-apa.

src: Don't forget the small details: Imagine that your elderly parent has a medical emergency and is on the way to the hospital.
mt: Jangan lupa pada perkhidmatan kecil: Bayangkan ibu bapak anda mengalami kecemasan kesihatan dan sedang berada di perjalanan ke hospital.

src: Would you be able to answer questions on medications and allergies?
mt: Bolehkah anda menjawab soalan mengenai ubat dan alahan?

src: Spell out those details in a written plan so that you're ready.
mt: Beri butir-butir tersebut dalam plan tertulis supaya siap.

src: "It's not just the financials that are in play, but who are the doctors?" asked Martin.
mt: "Martyn menanya, 'Bukan hanya soal perkaunan, tetapi siapa doktor-doktor itu?'"

src: "What are the medications?
mt: Apakah ubat-ubat itu?

src: Who will care for the dog?
mt: Siapa yang akan merawat anjing itu?

src: Have that plan in place."
mt: Siapkan plan tersebut.

src: Man shot multiple times with air rifle in Ilfracombe
mt: Seorang lelaki dianiaya dengan peluru berulang kali menggunakan pistol udara di Ilfracombe

src: A man has been shot multiple times with an air rifle as he walked home from a night out.
mt: Seorang lelaki telah ditembak beberapa kali dengan pistol udara semasa berjalan ke rumah selepas malam.

src: The victim, in his 40s, was in the Oxford Grove area of Ilfracombe, Devon, when he was shot in the chest, abdomen and hand.
mt: Korban, berusia 40-an, ditewaskan apabila ditembak di dada, perut, dan tangan di kawasan Oxford Grove, Ilfracombe, Devon.

src: Officers described the shooting, which took place at about 02:30 BST, as a "random act."
mt: Pengarah menghuraikan tindakan tembakkan yang berlaku pada kira-kira 02:30 BST sebagai "tindakan rawak."

src: The victim did not see his attacker.
mt: Pengembara tidak melihat penyerangnya.

src: His injuries are not life-threatening and police have appealed for witnesses.
mt: Cederaannya tidak memancarkan ancaman ke hidup dan polis meminta saksi.

src: Earthquakes and tsunamis in Indonesia
mt: Bumi bergetar dan gelombang pasang di Indonesia

src: At least 384 people have been killed by a powerful earthquake and tsunami that hit the Indonesian city of Palu on Friday, officials said, with the death toll expected to rise.
mt: Paling tidak 384 orang telah mati akibat gempur kuat dan tsunami yang menghujani bandar Palu di Indonesia pada hari Jumaat, kata pekerja awam, dengan jumlah mangsa yang dijangkakan meningkat.

src: With communications knocked out, relief officials have not been able to get any information from Donggala regency, an area north of Palu that is closer to the epicenter of the 7.5 magnitude quake.
mt: Dengan komunikasi terputus, pegawai pemulihan belum dapat memperoleh maklumat dari Negeri Donggala, kawasan utara Palu yang lebih dekat ke pusat gempa 7.5 magnitud.

src: In Palu, more than 16,000 people were evacuated after the disaster struck.
mt: Selepas bencana, lebih daripada 16,000 orang ditahan keluar dari Palu.

src: Here are some key facts about Palu and Donggala, on the island of Sulawesi:
mt: Berikut adalah beberapa fakta penting mengenai Palu dan Donggala, di pulau Sulawesi:

src: Palu is the capital of Central Sulawesi province, located at the end of a narrow bay on the west coast of Sulawesi island, with an estimated population of 379,800 in 2017.
mt: Palu ialah ibu kota negeri Sulawesi Selatan, terletak di hujung bahagian sempit di sebelah barat pulau Sulawesi, dengan jumlah penduduk yang diperkirakan 379,800 pada tahun 2017.

src: The city was celebrating its 40th anniversary when the quake and tsunami hit.
mt: Kota itu merayakan 40 tahun perayaannya apabila bencana gempa dan tsunami terjadi.

src: Donggala is a regency stretching along more than 300 km (180 miles) of coastline in the northwest of Sulawesi island.
mt: Donggala ialah daerah yang berhampiran lebih 300 km (180 mile) pendaratan di bahagian utara barat Sulawesi.

src: The regency, an administrative region below a province, had an estimated population of 299,200 in 2017.
mt: Kabupaten, sebuah kawasan adminstratif di bawah sebuah negeri, mempunyai populasi yang diperakui sebanyak 299,200 pada tahun 2017.

src: Fishing and farming are the mainstays of the Central Sulawesi province's economy, especially the coastal region of Donggala.
mt: Pancing dan pertanian adalah asas utama ekonomi negeri Sulawesi Tengah, khususnya kawasan pantai Donggala.

src: Nickel mining is also important in the province, but is mostly concentrated in Morowali, on the opposite coast of Sulawesi.
mt: Penggalian nikel juga penting dalam negeri ini, tetapi kebanyakan berlaku di Morowali, di sebelah pantai yang berlawanan dengan Sulawesi.

src: Palu and Donggala have been hit by tsunamis several times in the past 100 years, according to Indonesia's Disaster Mitigation Agency.
mt: Pulu dan Donggala telah dihujani ombak besar beberapa kali dalam 100 tahun terakhir menurut Badan Mitigasi Bencana Indonesia.

src: In 1938, a tsunami killed more than 200 people and destroyed hundreds of houses in Donggala.
mt: Dalam tahun 1938, tsunami membunuh lebih daripada 200 orang dan menghancurkan ribuan rumah di Donggala.

src: A tsunami also struck western Donggala in 1996, killing nine.
mt: Sebuah tsunami juga menyerang barat Donggala pada 1996, memakan nyawa sembilan orang.

src: Indonesia sits on the seismically Pacific Ring of Fire and is regularly hit by earthquakes.
mt: Indonesia terletak di sepanjang siri api Pasifik dan sering dihujani oleh gempa bumi.

src: Here are some of the major quakes and tsunamis in recent years:
mt: Berikut adalah beberapa gempa bumi dan tsunami utama dalam beberapa tahun terakhir:

src: 2004: A major quake on the western coast of Indonesia's Aceh province in northern Sumatra on Dec. 26 triggered a tsunami that struck 14 countries, killing 226,000 people along Indian Ocean coastline, more than half of them in Aceh.
mt: 2004: Bencana besar di pihak barat negeri Indonesia, negeri Aceh di utara Sumatra pada 26 Disember memicu gelombang pasang yang menyerang 14 negara, membunuh 226,000 orang di sepancbang Lautan Hindia, lebih daripada separuh daripada mereka di Aceh.

src: 2005: A series of strong quakes hit the western coast of Sumatra in late March and early April.
mt: 2005: Serangkaian gempa kuat menyerang pihak barat Sumatra pada akhir March dan awal April.

src: Hundreds died in Nias Island, off the coast of Sumatra.
mt: Ratusan meninggal di Pulau Nias, berhampiran dengan pesisir Sumatra.

src: 2006: A 6.8 magnitude hit south of Java, Indonesia's most populated island, triggering a tsunami that smashed into the southern coast, killing nearly 700 people.
mt: 2006: Bumi yang bergetar 6.8 berlangsa ke utara Java, pulau terbanyak penduduk Indonesia, memicu gelombang pasang yang menghancurkan pantai selatan, membunuh hampir 700 orang.

src: 2009: A 7.6 magnitude quake struck near the city of Padang, capital of West Sumatra province.
mt: 2009: Bumi bergetar dengan magnitud 7.6 berlaku di kawasan dekat bandar Padang, ibu kota negeri Sumatra Barat.

src: More than 1,100 people were killed.
mt: Lebih daripada 1,100 orang terbunuh.

src: 2010: A 7.5 magnitude quake hit one of the Mentawai islands, off Sumatra, triggering up tsunami of up to 10 meters that destroyed dozens of villages and killed around 300 people.
mt: 2010: Bumi berkejutan 7.5 menghujungi sebuah pulau Mentawai, berhampiran Sumatra, menyebabkan gelombang pasang laut hingga 10 meter yang merobek puluhan buah kampung dan membunuh sekitar 300 orang.

src: 2016: A shallow quake hit the Pidie Jaya regency in Aceh, causing destruction and panic as people were reminded by the devastation of the deadly 2004 quake and tsunami.
mt: 2016: Bumi bergetar lemah menyerang daerah Pidie Jaya, Aceh, menyebabkan kerusakan dan kekacauan kerana penduduk diingatkan oleh kekacauan bencana gempak dan ombak 2004 yang membunuh.

src: No tsunami was triggered this time, but more than 100 were killed by fallen buildings.
mt: Tidak ada tsunami yang terjadi pada ketika ini, tetapi lebih daripada 100 orang terbunuh akibat bangunan yang runtuh.

src: 2018: Major quakes hit Indonesia's tourist island of Lombok, killing more than 500 people, mostly on the northern side of the island.
mt: 2018: Bencana gempa besar menyerang pulau Lombok, sebuah tempat rekreasi Indonesia, memakan nyawa lebih daripada 500 orang, kebanyakan di sebelah utara pulau tersebut.

src: The quake destroyed thousands of buildings and left thousands of tourists temporarily stranded.
mt: Bebolak menghancurkan ribuan bangunan dan meninggalkan ribuan pelancong sementara terperangkap.

src: Sarah Palin's Eldest Son Arrested on Domestic Violence Charges
mt: Sarah Palin's Putera Terbesar Dikemukakan Kesalahan Kekerasan Dalam Rumah Tangga

src: Track Palin, the eldest son of former Alaska governor and vice presidential candidate Sarah Palin, has been arrested on assault charges.
mt: Percayai Palin, anak lelaki pertama bekas gubernur Alaska dan calon wakil presiden Sarah Palin, telah ditahan atas jenayah pukul.

src: Palin, 29, of Wasilla, Alaska, was arrested on suspicion of domestic violence, interfering with a report of domestic violence and resisting arrest, according to a report released Saturday by Alaska State Troopers.
mt: Palin, 29, dari Wasilla, Alaska, ditahan berdasarkan疑罪从有, menurut laporan yang dikeluarkan oleh Alaska State Troopers pada hari Sabtu.

src: According to the police report, when a female acquaintance attempted to call police to report the alleged crimes, he took her phone from her.
mt: Menurut laporan polis, ketika seorang teman perempuan cuba menghubungi polis untuk melaporkan kecurangan, dia mengambil telefonnya darinya.

src: Palin is being remanded in Mat-Su Pretrial Facility and is being held on a $500 unsecured bond, reported KTUU.
mt: Palin dikesankan di Tahanan Pra-Hakim Mat-Su dan ditahan dengan jaminan tak terbatas sebanyak $500, seperti yang dilaporkan oleh KTUU.

src: He appeared in court Saturday, where he declared himself "not guilty, for sure" when asked his plea, reported the network.
mt: Beliau muncul di mahkamah pada hari Sabtu, ketika ditanya tentang pengakuannya, beliau menyatakan "tidak bersalah, pasti", laporan media.

src: Palin faces three Class A misdemeanours, meaning he could be imprisoned for up to a year and fined $250,000.
mt: Palin muka tiga kesalahan kelas A, bermaksud dia boleh dihukum penjara hingga setahun dan dikenakan cukai $250,000.

src: He has also been charged with a Class B misdemeanour, punishable by a day in jail and a $2,000 fine.
mt: Dia juga dituduh dengan tindakan keliru kelas B, yang boleh dihukum dengan sehari di penjara dan denda $2,000.

src: It is not the first time criminal charges have been filed against Palin.
mt: Tidaklah kali pertama kesan tuntutan kriminal telah diajukan terhadap Palin.

src: In December 2017, he was accused of assaulting his father, Todd Palin.
mt: Pada Disember 2017, dia dituduh menyerang ibu bapanya, Todd Palin.

src: His mother, Sarah Palin, called police to report the alleged attack.
mt: Ibu dia, Sarah Palin, memanggil polis untuk melaporkan serangan yang disangkal.

src: The case is currently before Alaska's Veteran's Court.
mt: Kasus ini sedang dalam pendengaran Mahkamah Veteran Alaska.

src: In January 2016 he was charged with domestic assault, interfering with the report of a domestic violence crime, and possessing a weapon while intoxicated in connection with the incident.
mt: Makhluk itu dihukum pada Januari 2016 dengan kesalahan mengamuk dalam rumah tangga, mengganggu laporan mengenai kekerasan dalam rumah tangga, dan memegang senjata semasa mabuk dalam kaitan kejadian tersebut.

src: His girlfriend had alleged that he punched her in the face.
mt: Isterinya telah menuduh bahawa dia menyerang mukanya.

src: Sarah Palin was criticised by veterans groups in 2016 after linking her son's violent behaviour to PTSD stemming from his service in Iraq.
mt: Sarah Palin dikenal oleh kumpulan veteran pada 2016 setelah menyatakan bahawa tindakan bengis anak lelakinya disebabkan oleh PTSD yang diakibatkan oleh perkhidmatan beliau di Iraq.

src: Indonesia earthquake tsunami: hundreds killed
mt: Bencana gempa Indonesia dan tsunami: ratusan meninggal。

src: At least 384 people have died after an earthquake hit the Indonesian island of Sulawesi on Friday.
mt: 最少384人因星期五印尼苏拉威西岛发生地震而死亡。

src: The 7.5-magnitude earthquake triggered a tsunami and has destroyed thousands of homes.
mt: Bebolak 7.5 memanggil gelombang pasang dan telah menghancurkan ribuan rumah.

src: Electricity and communication networks are down with death tolls expected to rise in coming days.
mt: Pembangkitan elektrik dan jaringan komunikasi telah padam, dengan jumlah korban yang dijangkakan meningkat dalam beberapa hari ke depan.

src: The earthquake hit just off central Sulawesi which is northeast of the Indonesian capital, Jakarta.
mt: Bumi bergetar di sebelah utara Sulawesi utara yang berada di sebelah utara ibu kota Indonesia, Jakarta.

src: Videos are circulating on social media showing the moment of impact.
mt: Videolar mengalir di media sosial menunjukkan momen kemunculan.

src: Hundreds of people had gathered for a beach festival in the city of Palu when the tsunami smashed on shore.
mt: Ratusan orang telah berkumpul untuk sebuah festival pantai di bandar Palu apabila ombak tsunami menumbuk ke pantai.

src: Federal prosecutors seeking rare death penalty for NYC terror attack suspect
mt: Ahli-ahli peguam federal menuntut hukuman mati untuk tersabit serangan terror NYC

src: Federal prosecutors in New York are seeking the death penalty for Sayfullo Saipov, the suspect in the New York City terror attack that killed eight people -- a rare punishment that hasn't been carried out in the state for a federal crime since 1953.
mt: Ahli-ahli kesalahan federal di New York sedang memohon hukuman mati bagi Sayfullo Saipov, tersangka serangan teroris di New York City yang membunuh eight orang -- hukuman mati yang jarang diberikan kepada kesalahan federal di negara ini sejak 1953.

src: Saipov, 30, allegedly used a Home Depot rental truck to carry out an attack on a bike path along the West Side Highway in Lower Manhattan, mowing down pedestrians and cyclist in his path on Oct.
mt: Saipov, 30, dituduh menggunakan van sewa Home Depot untuk melakukan serangan di sepanjang jalur sepeda di Jalan West Side di Lower Manhattan, memotong pediatri dan pengguna sepeda di sepanjang jalan pada Okt.

src: In order to justify a death sentence, prosecutors will have to prove that Saipov "intentionally" killed the eight victims and "intentionally" inflicted serious bodily injury, according to the notice of intent to seek the death penalty, filed in the Southern District of New York.
mt: Ukuran untuk membenarkan hukuman mati, pegawai penyelidikan akan perlu membuktikan bahawa Saipov "sengaja" membunuh eight mangsa dan "sengaja" menimbulkan cedera fizikal yang serius, menurut pemberitahuan tujuan untuk memohon hukuman mati, yang telah dijangkau di District Southern New York.

src: Both of those counts carry a possibly death sentence, according to the court document.
mt: Kedua-dua tindakan tersebut mungkin mendapat hukuman mati, menurut dokumen mahkamah.

src: Weeks after the attack, a federal grand jury slapped Saipov with a 22-count indictment that included eight charges of murder in aid of racketeering, typically used by federal prosecutors in organized crime cases, and a charge of violence and destruction of motor vehicles.
mt: Beberapa minggu selepas serangan, sebuah jurucakap federal menetapkan tuntutan pengadilan federal terhadap Saipov dengan 22 tuduhan yang termasuk lapan tuduhan pembunuhan dalam bantuan organisasi kriminal, biasanya digunakan oleh pegawai pengadilan federal dalam kes kesalahan organisasi kriminal, dan satu tuduhan mengenai kekerasan dan penghancuran kenderaan.

src: The attack required "substantial planning and premeditation," prosecutors said, describing the manner in which Saipov carried it out as "heinous, cruel and depraved."
mt: Pendakwaan menyatakan bahawa serangan itu memerlukan "penyediaan yang mencukupi dan pemerancuhan," memaparkan cara Saipov menjalankannya sebagai "mengerikan, mengeruhkan dan mengeruhkan."

src: "Sayfullo Habibullaevic Saipov caused injury, harm, and loss to the families and friends of Diego Enrique Angelini, Nicholas Cleves, Ann-Laure Decadt, Darren Drake, Ariel Erlij, Hernan Ferruchi, Hernan Diego Mendoza, and Alejandro Damian Pagnucco," the notice of intent states.
mt: Pandangannya, pemberitahuan tujuan menyatakan bahawa Sayfullo Habibullaevic Saipov telah menyebabkan cedera, kerugian dan kehilangan kepada keluarga dan rakan-rakan Diego Enrique Angelini, Nicholas Cleves, Ann-Laure Decadt, Darren Drake, Ariel Erlij, Hernan Ferruchi, Hernan Diego Mendoza, dan Alejandro Damian Pagnucco.

src: Five of the victims were tourists from Argentina.
mt: Lima daripada mangsa-mangsa tersebut adalah pelancong dari Argentina.

src: It has been a decade since the Southern District of New York last prosecuted a death penalty case.
mt: Ia telah lama sembilan tahun sejak Southern District New York memproses kes hukuman mati terakhir.

src: The defendant, Khalid Barnes, was convicted of murdering two drug suppliers but was ultimately sentenced to life in prison in September 2009.
mt: Tersabit, Khalid Barnes, dihukum mati membunuh dua pemasok ubat tetapi akhirnya diberi hukuman mati dalam tahanan pada Ogos 2009.

src: The last time the death penalty was carried out in a New York federal case was in 1953 for Julius and Ethel Rosenberg, a married couple executed after they were convicted of conspiracy to commit espionage for the Soviet Union during the Cold War two years before.
mt: Kali terakhir hukuman mati dijalankan dalam kasus federal New York ialah pada 1953 terhadap Julius dan Ethel Rosenberg, suami isteri yang dihukum mati setelah dinyatakan bersalah dalam kes konspirasi untuk melakukan penyelenggaraan intelijen kepada Uni Soviet dua tahun sebelumnya semasa Perang Dingin.

src: Both Rosenbergs were both put to death by the electric chair on June 19, 1953.
mt: Kedua-dua Rosenbergs dihukum mati dengan alat tembikar pada 19 Jun 1953.

src: Saipov, a native of Uzbekistan, demonstrated a lack of remorse in the days and months following the attack, according to court documents.
mt: Saipov, seorang penduduk asli Uzbekistan, ditunjukkan tidak merasa bersalah dalam hari-hari dan bulan-bulan setelah serangan, menurut dokumen pengadilan.

src: He stated to investigators that he felt good about what he had done, police said.
mt: Beliau mengatakan kepada pegawai penyelidikan bahawa beliau merasa baik tentang apa yang telah dilakukan, kata polis.

src: Saipov told authorities he was inspired to carry out the attack after watching ISIS videos on his phone, according to the indictment.
mt: Mengikut dakwaan, saipov telah memutuskan untuk melakukan serangan setelah melihat video ISIS di telefonnya.

src: He also requested to display the ISIS flag in his hospital room, police said.
mt: Dia juga meminta untuk menunjukkan bendera ISIS di bilik hospitalnya, kata polis.

src: He has pleaded not guilty to the 22-count indictment.
mt: Dia telah memohon tidak bersalah terhadap tuntutan 22 butir.

src: David Patton, one of the federal public defenders representing Saipov, said they are "obviously disappointed" with the prosecution's decision.
mt: David Patton, salah satu penasihat hukum awam federal yang mewakili Saipov, berkata mereka "pasti kecewa" dengan keputusan penuntut umum.

src: "We think the decision to seek the death penalty rather than accepting a guilty plea to life in prison with no possibility of release will only prolong the trauma of these events for everyone involved," Patton said.
mt: "Kami berfikiran bahawa keputusan untuk menuntut hukuman mati sebaliknya menerima pengakuan bersalah untuk menjalani hukuman penjara seumur hidup tanpa kemungkinan dibebaskan akan hanya memperpanjang trauma kejadian ini kepada semua pihak," kata Patton.

src: Saipov's defense team had previously asked prosecutors not to seek the death penalty.
mt: Timbalan pertahanan Saipov sebelumnya meminta pegawai pemerintah tidak menuntut hukuman mati.

src: Tory MP says NIGEL FARAGE should be put in charge of Brexit negotiations
mt: Ahli Parlimen Tory menyatakan NIGEL FARAGE perlu diberi tugas mengurus perundingan Brexit.

src: Nigel Farage vowed to 'mobilise the people's army' today during a protest at the Tory conference.
mt: Nigel Farage berjanji untuk 'mobilkan pasukan rakyat' hari ini semasa protes di konferensi Konservatif.

src: The former Ukip leader said politicians had to 'feel the heat' from Eurosceptics - as one of Theresa May's own MPs suggested he should be in charge of negotiations with the EU.
mt: Pemimpin mantap UKIP berkata pemimpin politik perlu 'merasakan panas' daripada orang-orang yang skeptik terhadap Euro - sebagai salah satu anggota parlimen Theresa May menyarankan dia sepatut memimpin negosiasi dengan EU.

src: Conservative backbencher Peter Bone told the march in Birmingham that the UK 'would have been out' by now if Mr Farage was Brexit Secretary.
mt: Pemimpin konservatif Peter Bone memberi maklumatan kepada perhimpunan di Birmingham bahawa UK akan telah berada di luar jika Tuan Farage adalah Menteri Perdana Kebangsaan.

src: But the challenge Mrs May faces in reconciling her deeply divided ranks has been underlined by pro-Remain Tories joining a separate protest against Brexit in the city.
mt: Tetapi cabang permasalahan yang dihadapi Tanaharta May dalam menyelesaikan perpecahan dalam kawannya telah ditekankan oleh kumpulan Konservatif yang mendukung Perbaniakan mengadakan protes terpisah melawan Perbaniakan di kota tersebut.

src: The premier is struggling to keep her Chequers compromise plan on track amid attacks from Brexiteers, Remainers and the EU.
mt: Pemimpin perahan sedang berusaha mempertahankan plan pelerapan Chequers di bawah tekanan daripada Brexiteers, Remainers dan EU.

src: Allies insisted she will push ahead with trying to strike a deal with Brussels despite the backlash - and force Eurosceptics and Labour to choose between her package and 'chaos'.
mt: Pihak-pihak persekutuan menegaskan bahawa dia akan terus cuba menyelesaikan perjanjian dengan Brussels meskipun ada kritik, dan memaksa pengikut Euroscepticism dan Labour untuk memilih antara paketnya dan 'kacau'.

src: Mr Bone told the Leave Means Leave rally in Solihull that he wanted to 'chuck Chequers'.
mt: Beliau berkata dalam majlis perhimpunan Leave Means Leave di Solihull bahawa beliau ingin 'menghancurkan Chequers'.

src: He suggested Mr Farage should have been made a peer and given responsibility for negotiations with Brussels.
mt: Dia menyaruhkan kepada Tuan Farage sepatutnya dilantik sebagai seorang pejat dan diberi tanggungjawab untuk membincangkan negosiasi dengan Brussels.

src: 'If he had been in charge, we would have been out by now,' he said.
mt: 'Dia mungkin telah menangani masalah itu, kita akan telah keluar sekarang,' katanya.

src: The Wellingborough MP added: 'I will stand up for Brexit but we need to chuck Chequers.'
mt: Ahli parlimen Wellingborough menambah: "Saya akan berjuang untuk Brexit tetapi kita perlu buang Chequers."

src: Setting out his opposition to the EU, he said: 'We didn't fight world wars to be subservient.
mt: Mencerahkan penentangan terhadap EU, beliau berkata: "Kami tidak perang dunia untuk menjadi hamba."

src: We want to make our own laws in our own country.'
mt: Kita mahu membuat undang-undang sendiri di dalam negara kita.

src: Mr Bone dismissed suggestions that public opinion had changed since the 2016 vote: 'The idea that the British people have changed their minds and want to remain is completely untrue.'
mt: Tuan Bone menolak cadangan bahawa opini awam telah berubah sejak undi 2016: "Kemungkinan bahawa orang British telah berubah pendirian dan ingin tinggal adalah tidak benar."

src: Tory Brexiteer Andrea Jenkyns was also at the march, telling reporters: 'I am simply saying: Prime Minister, listen to the people.
mt: Pemimpin majoriti Andrea Jenkyns, seorang Brexiteer, juga hadir dalam pergi. Dia berkata kepada pemberita: "Saya hanya menegaskan: Pemimpin Periang, dengarkan rakyat.

src: 'Chequers is unpopular with the general public, the Opposition's not going to vote for it, it's unpopular with our party and our activists who actually pound the streets and get us elected in the first place.
mt: Chequers tidak disenangi oleh orang awam umum, pihak lawan tidak akan memilih untuknya, ia tidak disenangi oleh parti kami dan aktivis kami yang sebenarnya menekan jalan dan membawa kami terpilih pada masa awalnya.

src: Please drop Chequers and start listening.'
mt: Sila lepaskan Chequers dan mula mendengar.

src: In a pointed message to Mrs May, she added: 'Prime ministers keep their jobs when they keep their promises.'
mt: Mengenai perkataan tajam kepada Tuan Mays, dia menambah: "Menteri Kebangsaan tetap menjaga kerja mereka apabila mereka memenuhi janji mereka."

src: Mr Farage told the rally politicians must be made to 'feel the heat' if they were about to betray the decision made in the 2016 referendum.
mt: Tuan Farage berkata kepada majlis lawat tersebut bahawa para pemimpin harus dibuat 'merasakan kepanasan' jika mereka akan menyerahkan keputusan yang dibuat dalam pemilihan umum 2016.

src: 'This is now about a matter of trust between us - the people - and our political class,' he said.
mt: 'Dalam masa kini, ini adalah masalah kepercayaan antara kita - orang-orang - dan kelas politik kita,' katanya.

src: 'They are trying to betray Brexit and we are here today to tell them 'we won't let you get away with doing that'.'
mt: "Mereka sedang cuba menipu Brexit dan kita berada di sini hari ini untuk berkata 'kita tidak akan biarkan kamu menipu begitu.'".

src: In a message to the enthusiastic crowd he added: 'I want you to make our political class, who are on the verge of betraying Brexit, feel the heat.
mt: Dalam pesan kepada ketakutan, dia menambahkan: "Saya mahu kamu membuat kelas politik kita, yang hampir melanggar Brexit, merasakan kepanikan."

src: 'We are mobilising the people's army of this country that gave us victory in Brexit and will never rest until we have become an independent, self-governing, proud United Kingdom.'
mt: 'Sebagai pembentangan, kami sedang memobilkan pasukan rakyat negara ini yang memberi kami kemenangan dalam Brexit dan tidak akan berhenti sehingga kami menjadi sebuah United Kingdom yang mandiri, mengurus sendiri, dan bangga.'

src: Meanwhile, Remainers marched through Birmingham before holding a two-hour rally in the city centre.
mt: Sementara itu, penentang pemisahan berjalan melalui Birmingham sebelum menaja satu program dua jam di pusat bandar.

src: A smattering of activists waved Tories Against Brexit banners after the launch of the group this weekend.
mt: Sebuah kumpulan aktivis memakai banner 'Tory Against Brexit' selepas kumpulan itu dilancarkan minggu ini.

src: Labour peer Lord Adonis mocked the Conservatives for the security issues they suffered with a party app as the conference opened.
mt: Ahli-ahli perahan buruh Lord Adonis menghina konservatif kerana masalah keselamatan yang mereka alami dengan aplikasi parti semasa majlis dibuka.

src: 'These are the people who tell us they can have the IT systems in place and all of the technology for Canada plus plus, for the frictionless border, for free trade without borders in Ireland,' he added.
mt: 'Dari mereka yang menyatakan bahawa mereka boleh menyediakan sistem maklumat dan semua teknologi untuk Kanada serta tambahan, bagi perbatasan yang tanpa gesekan, perdagangan bebas tanpa perbatasan di Ireland,' tambahnya.

src: 'It is a complete farce.
mt: Ia ialah farce yang lengkap.

src: There isn't such a thing as a good Brexit,' he added.
mt: Dia menambah, "Tidak ada apa-apa yang disebut seorang Brexit yang baik."

src: Warren plans to take a 'hard look' at running for president
mt: Warren berplan untuk mengambil 'lihatan keras' mengenai calon presiden.

src: U.S. Sen. Elizabeth Warren says she'll take a "hard look at running for president" after the November elections.
mt: Ahli Politik Amerika Elizabeth Warren berkata dia akan meninjau kembali "mengambil langkah keras dalam memimpin" selepas pemilihan pada November.

src: The Boston Globe reports the Massachusetts Democrat spoke about her future during a town hall in western Massachusetts Saturday.
mt: Kemaskini Boston Globe melaporkan pesakit Demokrat Massachusetts membicarakan masa depannya semasa sesi kawalan di bahagian barat Massachusetts pada hari Sabtu.

src: Warren, a frequent critic of President Donald Trump, is running for re-election in November against GOP state Rep. Geoff Diehl, who was co-chairman of Trump's 2016 Massachusetts campaign.
mt: Warren, seorang kritik yang sering terhadap Presiden Donald Trump, sedang berlari untuk pemilihan ulang pada November melawan Pengguna Negeri GOP Geoff Diehl, yang merupakan ketua bersama kampanye Massachusetts Trump pada 2016.

src: She has been at the center of speculation that she might take on Trump in 2020.
mt: Dia telah menjadi pusat spekulasi bahawa dia mungkin berdepan dengan Trump pada 2020.

src: Saturday afternoon's event in Holyoke was her 36th meeting with constituents using the town hall format since Trump took office.
mt: Sesi acara petang hari Ahad di Holyoke adalah ketiga puluh enam kali pertemuan dengan wakil rakyatnya menggunakan format majlis kota sejak Trump memegang jawatan.

src: An attendee asked her if she planned to run for president.
mt: Seorang peserta bertanya kepadanya whether dia berplan untuk calon presiden.

src: Warren replied that it's time "for women to go to Washington to fix our broken government, and that includes a woman at the top."
mt: Warren menjawab bahawa masanya "bagi perempuan pergi ke Washington untuk memperbaiki kerajaan kita yang hancur, dan ini termasuk seorang perempuan di tingkatan tertinggi."

src: Arrest made in shooting death of LSU's Sims
mt: Penangkapan berdasarkan pembunuhan LSU's Sims

src: Police in Baton Rouge, La., announced Saturday that a suspect has been arrested in the shooting death of LSU basketball player Wayde Sims on Friday.
mt: Pihak polis di Baton Rouge, Louisiana, memberi makluman pada hari Sabtu bahawa seorang tersabit telah ditahan dalam kematian mangsa tembakkan terhadap pemain bola basket LSU, Wayde Sims, pada hari Jumaat.

src: The Baton Rouge Police Department announced the arrest of Dyteon Simpson, 20, at an 11 a.m. ET news conference.
mt: Pihak polis Baton Rouge memberi umum penahanan Dyteon Simpson, 20, semasa satu kongres berita pada pukul 11.00 pagi Waktu Tengah Amerika.

src: They had released a video of the shooting on Friday, asking for help identifying a man seen in the footage.
mt: Mereka telah memadamkan video tembakan pada hari Jumaat, meminta bantuan mengenali seorang lelaki yang terlihat dalam video tersebut.

src: Sims, 20, was shot and killed near Southern University's campus early Friday.
mt: Sims, 20, ditembak dan terbunuh di sekitar kampus Universiti Selatan pada hari Jumaat awal.

src: "Wayde Sims suffered a gunshot wound to the head and ultimately died as a result," police chief Murphy J. Paul told the media Saturday, per 247sports.
